faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters of Aptech Computer Education?
faqs.answer:
Aptech Computer Education has excellent relationships with major corporations that frequently employ its graduates. Consider this: TCS, the industry leader in IT services, frequently hires recent graduates from Aptech. These students stand out to them, most likely because Aptech ensures that they are prepared for the technological obstacles that arise in the real world.
And lastly, Infosys is yet another well-known IT company. They value the transferable capabilities Aptech gives its students. Aptech appears to be imparting the exact skills that organizations such as Infosys are seeking in prospective employees.
Another major player in the tech industry, Wipro, supports employment from Aptech. They appear to be getting precisely that in Aptech—people who know their way around computers.
International tech giant Tech Mahindra.

faqs.question: Is Aptech Computer Education the best in Mumbai?
faqs.answer:
One of Aptech Limited's member companies, Aptech Computer Education was founded in 1986. It is a multinational center for training and education with its main office located in Mumbai. One of the reputable centers among the 1,300 centers spread throughout 43 countries, including West Asia, South America, Africa, Russia, and South East Asia, and the 863 centers in India is Aptech Computer Education, Andheri West.
This institute provides a wide range of computer-based courses in a number of specializations, including Big Data Hadoop Programming, Java, .NET, Embedded Programming, App Development, Software Project Management, and Android Development. The learning requirements of recent graduates, undergraduates, working professionals, etc. are met by these courses. Advanced career, professional, short-term, and certification programs are the main course categories.

placements.overview:
Aptech Computer Education Mumbai has set-up a dedicated Placement Cell which organises placement workshops to train students on cracking job interviews as well as the aptitude test. During Aptech Computer Education placements 2019, a total number of 188 students got placed from various centres across the country. Highest salary package offered was Rs 3 LPA by CSC.

Some major software companies who participated in the placement drive 2019 include TCS, Capgemini, Cognizant, Ernst & Young, NOKIA, Quickheal, Trihedron Infotech, Datamatics, Infosys, IBM, Wipro, among others.

paragraphs: Aptech Computer Education Mumbai admissionsare merit-based. The institute considers the marks of the candidates in the qualifying exam for admission.Aptech Computer Educationis a global education and training center located in Mumbai under the umbrella head of Aptech Limited. The institute offers technology certification courses for students, graduates or Engineers. Interested candidates can fill out the form and contact the admission office for details.

Admissions at Aptech are open for all courses. Candidates must fulfil the basic requirements to apply for a course at the institute. Below areAptech Computer Education coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Candidates after applying for a course have to pay a fee. The course fee includes all the benefits associated with the programme. Below isAptech Computer Education feesfor all courses:

The institute has a variety of courses in technical field. Students can also opt for short-term courses offered by Aptech. Below are the steps to get a seat in the institute:

Step 2:The selection to all the courses of Aptech is based on merit of the aspirants in the last qualifying exam.

college_info.college_name: Apeejay College of Fine Arts: Admissions 2025, Courses, Fees, Placements, Eligibility

highlights.summary: Apeejay College of Fine Arts Admissions 2025 are currently ongoing. Interested candidates can apply online on the official website.

college_info.intro: Apeejay College of Fine Arts offers a variety of courses at undergraduate and postgraduate levels. The popular programmes at ACFA Punjab include B.Voc, BA, and B.Des, among others.

placements.overview:
Apeejay College of Fine Arts is an institute. Apeejay College of Fine Arts offers a total of 40 courses at UG and PG levels in 4 specialisations such as Data Science, Computer Science, English and Textile Design. Furthermore, it offer courses such as MBA/PGDM, B.Sc., BCA, B.Com and B.A. in Full Time mode. Apeejay College of Fine Arts fee structure includes a total tuition fee ranging from INR 70,125 to 4,15,000. Apeejay College of Fine Arts has an annual seat intake of 1440 for all the programmes. It offers courses, in streams such as Medicine & Health Sciences, Business & Management Studies, IT & Software, Accounting & Commerce, Arts ( Fine / Visual / Performing ) and Design. As per the recent Apeejay College of Fine Arts placement records, the average median salary at the Institute is around INR 2,96,364. The institute has a safe and well-equipped campus with all the advanced facilities.

Apeejay College of Fine Arts offers a variety of courses at undergraduate and postgraduate levels. The popular programmes at ACFA Punjab include B.Voc, BA, and B.Des, among others.

Apeejay College of Fine Arts offers admissions to courses at the UG and PG levels. ACFA admissions are completely based on merit obtained in the qualifying exam. These are offered in multiple streams, such as Arts (Fine/ Visual/ Performing), Science, Commerce, Design, Technology, Medicine and Health Sciences, and Animation. Candidates seeking admission to Apeejay College of Fine Arts can apply online on the official website (acfa.apeejay.edu).

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Com - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Admission to the M.Com Course in the year 2025-26.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 72% of students were placed. The lowest package was 2.8 LPA, the highest was 8.5 LPA, and the average was about 4.7 LPA. PwC, ICICI, Axis Bank, and audit firms are major recruiters. Many were able to secure internships in finance and taxation. Limitation: fewer positions in the analytics and stock market sectors.
review_content.Infrastructure: The department features Wi-Fi classrooms, labs for accounting software, and a respectable library with resources related to commerce. There is a gym and a sports field, and the hostel is manageable. Food quality is mediocre and occasionally monotonous. Although it is available, medical care is not always available.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Com - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: The M.Com course intake for the year 2026 provides a lot of information, including placements, etc.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 70% of students are placed. The lowest package is 3 LPA, the highest is 9 LPA, and the average is about 5 LPA. Recruiters include EY, ICICI, HDFC, and Deloitte. Internships are primarily in accounting firms and banks. The drawback is that there are fewer core research positions available.
review_content.Infrastructure: Good classrooms with Wi-Fi, accounting software computer labs, and a library with trade journals. Sports facilities and the hostel are both good. The mess food is average with little variation. Limited medical assistance is available. The college organizes many sports and games facilities.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.A in English - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Apeejay College of Fine Arts in M.A. English course intake year 2026-27.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 65% of students are placed. The lowest package is 2.5 LPA, the highest is 7 LPA, and the average is about 4.5 LPA. Media companies, schools, and publishing houses are among the recruiters. Internships are available in teaching and content writing positions. Limited corporate roles continue to be a disadvantage.
review_content.Infrastructure: It has extensive collections of books, digital resources, and classrooms equipped with Wi-Fi. The library is strong. The food is decent but not very varied. The hostel is decent. There are sports and medical facilities available, but the hostel could use some cleaning.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: My experience in journalism and mass communication at Appejay College of Fine Arts.

review_content.Placements: The placement opportunities at Apeejay College of Fine Arts are quite encouraging when the students are eager to step into their professional careers. The organizations for campus recruitment and the placement cell provide constant guidance through workshops, training sessions and interview preparations.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of Apeejay College of Fine Arts is well maintained. The students are very friendly with classrooms that are equipped for interactive learning and a dedicated space for media and journalism activities, such as studios labs and seminar hall.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Voc. in E-Commerce - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: M.Voc. E-commerce course admission in 2k26.

review_content.Placements: Approximately 70% of students were placed. The average package is about 3.5 LPA, the lowest is 2.2 LPA, and the highest is about 6 LPA. Among the positions were operations associate, e-commerce analyst, and digital marketing executive. Businesses like Amazon, Flipkart, and startups have arrived. There were internships available, but many of them were unpaid.
review_content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi and basic E-commerce software tools were available in the labs, and the library was helpful but not always up to date. Classrooms were fine, but projector problems were common. The sports area is small, the food is mediocre, and the hostel rooms are decent. Medical assistance is good, but not always available.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Voc. in E-Commerce - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: About M.Voc. E-commerce course admission in year 2025.

review_content.Placements: About 82% of the M.Voc E-commerce students in our class are placed. The average package is roughly 4.6 LPA, with the lowest being 2.8 LPA, and the highest being 8.5 LPA. Recruiters included Amazon, Flipkart, TCS, and local startups. Nearly 70% of students are successful in landing internships at digital marketing companies, logistics companies, and e-commerce platforms. The available roles included e-commerce executive, digital marketing analyst, supply chain coordinator, and web store manager.
review_content.Infrastructure: The internet and computers in the labs are modern, but sometimes the systems are slow. Despite having e-commerce journals, the library's sophisticated digital resources are scarce. Hostel rooms are decent but not very spacious. The mess food is mediocre, but the canteen has a wider selection. The majority of the games are played indoors, and there are not many sports facilities.

review_summary.college_name: Apeejay College of Fine Arts Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: M.Com - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Admission to the M.Com Course in the year 2025-26.

content.Placements: Approximately 72% of students were placed. The lowest package was 2.8 LPA, the highest was 8.5 LPA, and the average was about 4.7 LPA. PwC, ICICI, Axis Bank, and audit firms are major recruiters. Many were able to secure internships in finance and taxation. Limitation: fewer positions in the analytics and stock market sectors.
content.Infrastructure: The department features Wi-Fi classrooms, labs for accounting software, and a respectable library with resources related to commerce. There is a gym and a sports field, and the hostel is manageable. Food quality is mediocre and occasionally monotonous. Although it is available, medical care is not always available.

individual_reviews.course: M.Com - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: The M.Com course intake for the year 2026 provides a lot of information, including placements, etc.

content.Placements: Approximately 70% of students are placed. The lowest package is 3 LPA, the highest is 9 LPA, and the average is about 5 LPA. Recruiters include EY, ICICI, HDFC, and Deloitte. Internships are primarily in accounting firms and banks. The drawback is that there are fewer core research positions available.
content.Infrastructure: Good classrooms with Wi-Fi, accounting software computer labs, and a library with trade journals. Sports facilities and the hostel are both good. The mess food is average with little variation. Limited medical assistance is available. The college organizes many sports and games facilities.

individual_reviews.course: M.A in English - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Apeejay College of Fine Arts in M.A. English course intake year 2026-27.

content.Placements: Approximately 65% of students are placed. The lowest package is 2.5 LPA, the highest is 7 LPA, and the average is about 4.5 LPA. Media companies, schools, and publishing houses are among the recruiters. Internships are available in teaching and content writing positions. Limited corporate roles continue to be a disadvantage.
content.Infrastructure: It has extensive collections of books, digital resources, and classrooms equipped with Wi-Fi. The library is strong. The food is decent but not very varied. The hostel is decent. There are sports and medical facilities available, but the hostel could use some cleaning.

individual_reviews.course: B.A. in Journalism and Mass Communication - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: My experience in journalism and mass communication at Appejay College of Fine Arts.

content.Placements: The placement opportunities at Apeejay College of Fine Arts are quite encouraging when the students are eager to step into their professional careers. The organizations for campus recruitment and the placement cell provide constant guidance through workshops, training sessions and interview preparations.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of Apeejay College of Fine Arts is well maintained. The students are very friendly with classrooms that are equipped for interactive learning and a dedicated space for media and journalism activities, such as studios labs and seminar hall.

individual_reviews.course: M.Voc. in E-Commerce - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: M.Voc. E-commerce course admission in 2k26.

content.Placements: Approximately 70% of students were placed. The average package is about 3.5 LPA, the lowest is 2.2 LPA, and the highest is about 6 LPA. Among the positions were operations associate, e-commerce analyst, and digital marketing executive. Businesses like Amazon, Flipkart, and startups have arrived. There were internships available, but many of them were unpaid.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi and basic E-commerce software tools were available in the labs, and the library was helpful but not always up to date. Classrooms were fine, but projector problems were common. The sports area is small, the food is mediocre, and the hostel rooms are decent. Medical assistance is good, but not always available.

outlook.description:
According to the rankings from Outlook-ICARE, Apeejay College of Fine Arts outperformed various other institutes, securing a higher position for its achievements in Teaching, Graduation Success Rates, Research, and creating an inclusive, quality learning environment. Apeejay College of Fine Arts's rankings in 'BBA' category have shown a fluctuating trend as per the rankings of the previous years. In 2025, Apeejay College of Fine Arts's rank is #62, the same as last year's rank in the 'BBA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.
The ranks granted to the institute in the 'BCA' category have shown a fluctuating trend when compared to last year's rankings. In 2025, Apeejay College of Fine Arts's rank is #108, the same as last year's rank in the 'BCA' category by the Outlook-ICARE ranking.

reviews.review_heading: Admission to the M.Com Course in the year 2025-26.
reviews.review_text: The department features Wi-Fi classrooms, labs for accounting software, and a respectable library with resources related to commerce. There is a gym and a sports field, and the hostel is manageable. Food quality is mediocre and occasionally monotonous. Although it is available, medical care is not always available.

reviews.review_heading: The M.Com course intake for the year 2026 provides a lot of information, including placements, etc.
reviews.review_text: Good classrooms with Wi-Fi, accounting software computer labs, and a library with trade journals. Sports facilities and the hostel are both good. The mess food is average with little variation. Limited medical assistance is available. The college organizes many sports and games facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Apeejay College of Fine Arts in M.A. English course intake year 2026-27.
reviews.review_text: It has extensive collections of books, digital resources, and classrooms equipped with Wi-Fi. The library is strong. The food is decent but not very varied. The hostel is decent. There are sports and medical facilities available, but the hostel could use some cleaning.

reviews.review_heading: My experience in journalism and mass communication at Appejay College of Fine Arts.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Apeejay College of Fine Arts is well maintained. The students are very friendly with classrooms that are equipped for interactive learning and a dedicated space for media and journalism activities, such as studios labs and seminar hall.

reviews.review_heading: M.Voc. E-commerce course admission in 2k26.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi and basic E-commerce software tools were available in the labs, and the library was helpful but not always up to date. Classrooms were fine, but projector problems were common. The sports area is small, the food is mediocre, and the hostel rooms are decent. Medical assistance is good, but not always available.

reviews.review_heading: About M.Voc. E-commerce course admission in year 2025.
reviews.review_text: The internet and computers in the labs are modern, but sometimes the systems are slow. Despite having e-commerce journals, the library's sophisticated digital resources are scarce. Hostel rooms are decent but not very spacious. The mess food is mediocre, but the canteen has a wider selection. The majority of the games are played indoors, and there are not many sports facilities.

reviews.review_heading: My best moment starts from Apeejay College of Fine Arts.
reviews.review_text: The university infrastructure is quite good. Classrooms are clean and comfortable. There is a strong Wi-Fi across the campus. The library is well-stocked with books related to commerce, finance, business law, etc. It is a good place to sit and study quietly. The mess food is better than most private colleges. It is vegetarian, but the quality and hygiene are well-maintained.

reviews.review_heading: My college is very helpful in my career.
reviews.review_text: The campus is open and airy with lots of space to roam and relax. There are two gardens, one for girls and one for boys, and four toilets, two for each gender. The canteen is always open and there are plenty of chairs and tables in the gardens. The library is a great place to study, and it's a very good campus.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with the campus. Not so good in placements.
reviews.review_text: No hostels are available. The library is fine but not that big. Facility members, i.e., the staff, are good. In some classrooms, AC is present, but the majority are without AC. Computer labs and IT departments are available. The MAC forum department is for commerce. Fests are nice.

reviews.review_heading: The college fulfills all the needs of the students.
reviews.review_text: In our hostel, we have a bed, table, chair, and shelf, and each room is a single room. There are 199 rooms in the hostel. The meals that each mess manager provides vary, but the food is really tasty. With the application of the college there, they gave space for an opting hall or not and only 19,500 Rs. For one-year hostel stays, which includes food and all activities happening in the hall, including hall day.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college to pursue higher studies.
reviews.review_text: All hostels and rooms are very beautiful. They provide all the necessary elements in rooms. They are on campus. The food served in the mess is very good and hygienic. Wi-Fi is available in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Professors at this college are highly educated in their respective fields.
reviews.review_text: Our college did not have any hostel or mess facilities. It is a small college, and mostly we have locals coming. If there are outstation students, they arrange PGs in the city, which are easily available, especially around the college areas. PG rentals start at INR 5K per month to INR 10K per month, depending on the room and the facilities.

reviews.review_heading: I am pretty satisfied with it.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were good. Our campus did not have the facility of Wi-Fi and air-conditioners for commerce students of BBA and B.Com. Other than that, they were all good. Food available in the canteen was very delicious. We always used to like food and hang out.

reviews.review_heading: Good faculty, personality development & building up confidence .
reviews.review_text: The library is really good. You'll get all the necessary material over there. Not just that there are novels and other books too. So apart from education a student can explore other options. In my view canteen is not very good, but the facilities changes with time. And for infrastructure, college remains clean and hygienic. But according to what amount they charge from students, they could do much more.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with college.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college was average and could be improved. According to the fee structure, it was less in terms of infrastructure, but overall, it was not that bad. Canteen facilities were good, and the park was also maintained. Classrooms can be improved. The auditorium was well-maintained, and functional attributes were appropriate.

college_info.intro:
Radha Govind University popular programmes are BTech & BCom. BTech students are placed in top companies such as Reliance, Amazon, HDFC Bank, & others. BTech is provided in various specialisations such as Mechanical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Electrical & Electronics Engineering, & others. BTech students can become Software Engineers, Developers, or can take part in various activities relevant to their field.
Radha Govind University BTech students study various subjects & some of them are circuit theory, microprocessors, electromagnetism, digital electronics, power electronics, & others. The curriculum encompasses both practical applications & theoretical knowledge. Below mentioned are some of the courses offered by Radha Govind University & their respective eligibility & Radha Govind University fee structure:

admission_overview.college_name: Radha Govind University Admission 2025: Fee, Eligibility & Dates

paragraphs: Radha Govind University admission 2025is open. AtRadha Govind University, students can pursue courses in various streams such asPharmacy,Science,Management, Law, Library Science,etc. The university offers courses such as BBA, BSc, BCom, MA, MBA, and more at the UG and PG levels. Apart from these, it also offers diploma and doctoral programmes across several subjects. Admissions to RGU Ramgarh are accepted on the basis of both merit and valid scores obtained in the relevant entrance exams.

Radha Govind University admissions are both merit and entrance-based. It also accepts valid scores obtained in national-level entrance exams for admissions to its programmes. All of the courses offered atRGU Ramgarhare in regular mode. Find below the key highlights forRadha Govind University admissions:
RGU Ramgarh Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Full-time/ Regular mode
Programmes offered
40 (excluding specialisations)
How to apply
UG courses: INR 10,000 - INR 3.6 lakh
PG courses: INR 18,000 - INR 1.6 lakh
Level of programmes offered
UG| PG| Diploma| PhD
Popular programmes
BA| BSc| BTech| MA| MSc
Download Brochure

Students are accepted into the UG, PG and Diploma programmes offered at RGU Ramgarh on an entrance basis for courses such as MBA, PhD and more. The university also offers admissions on a merit basis for a wide range of its courses. For PhD courses, the university conducts its own entrance exam, however, those with a valid score in other national-level exams are exempted from appearing for the test. The table below carries the eligibility and selection details for thecourses offered at Radha Govind University:
Course Name

Know more aboutRGU Ramgarh courses.

The total tuitionfee of Radha Govind Universityvaries according to the programme selected by the students. The candidates must pay the programme fee to confirm the admission. Find below the details for theRGU Ramgarh fee:

Students are offered seats in the programmes offered at RGU Ramgarh on the basis of either academic merit or performance in the entrance exam (whichever is applicable). The below-mentioned table contains information regardingRadha Govind University seat intakefor some of its courses:
Course Name
Seat Intake
Note:This information is sourced from the official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change.

Radha Govind University admissionsare offered based on both entrance and merit secured by applicants in their most recent qualifying exam depending on the programme chosen. For PhD admissions, candidates will have to appear for the PhD Entrance Test conducted by the university. However, if the applicants have appeared in exams such as NET, SLET, JRF, GATE, JET, etc. The eligible candidates can refer to the below-mentioned steps for theadmission process of Radha Govind University:

Step 1: RGU Ramgarh Application Process:Visit the official website of RGU Ramgarh and register yourself. Your application ID and password will be sent to you via email and SMS. Fill out the application process, select the desired programme and proceed with the payment of the application fee to successfully submit the application form.
Step 2: RGU Ramgarh Selection Process

Most of the programmes offered at Radha Govind University accept admissions based on the merit secured by the students in the qualifying exam. For some of its courses, the university accepts students on an entrance basis, for which the applicants must appear for the specified exam. Those who clear the entrance exam will be contacted via mail by the university for further details.
Step 3: Fee Payment and Admission ConfirmationThe shortlisted candidates will be accepted into the programme once they have paid the course fee and submitted the specified documents.

courses_data.description: Radha Govind University offers students a three-year UG degree inBachelor of Scienceacross a variety of specialisations such asBSc in Nursing,BSc in Agricultural Scienceand more. The university accepts admissions to the BSc course on a merit basis. Candidates with a valid score in entrance exam such asCUETwill also be considered for direct admission to the programme. faqs.question: What is the last date to apply for Radha Govind University admission?
faqs.answer: Radha Govind University last dat to apply is  in the third week of June. It is the deadline for normal fees for undergraduate programs such as BTech, BSc, BCom, BA, and BCA.Deadline to avoid late fees: first week of JulyThe second week of June is the deadline for PG programs like MTech, MCA, and MSc with standard fees.The final week of June is when late fees are due.Regarding management and MBA programs:Deadline for normal fees is the second week of May.The fourth week of May is when late fees are due.First week of July is the last day to apply regular fees for law programs such as LLB and LLM.Deadline to avoid late fees: the third week of July.

faqs.question: Does Radha Govind University refund fees?
faqs.answer: A student's complete tuition is refunded by the university, after subtracting the processing fee, if the candidate withdraws his application before the final date of admission.Refunds for admissions are cancelled after the the final date of admission, but if it is cancelled before classes begin 60 - 70%  is refunded.If a student leaves the programme midway through, there is no refund of payment once sessions begin. security deposits can be refunded.If a first-year UG student withdraws their acceptance within one to two months after the beginning of classes, they may be eligible for a 50% return of the fee.

average_package.title: Radha Govind University Average Package 2024

faqs.question: What is the average package for B.Tech students at Radha Govind University?
faqs.answer: Radha Govind University provides B.Tech students an average package of INR 4-6 LPA (Lakhs per annum). Here are a few more specifics: At RGU, the highest package available to B.Tech students is between INR 18 and 20 LPA. But this is limited to the best students. This typical package covers a variety of fields, including electronics, mechanical, civil, computer science, and IT. Compared to core engineering professions, computer science and associated fields often command somewhat higher average incomes. The typical package offered by FMCG and manufacturing industries is between INR 3.5 and INR 4.5 LPA. The average salary for IT/analytics organizations such as TCS, Infosys, and Wipro is between INR 4-6 LPA.

faqs.question: How much does B.Sc at Radha Govind University cost?
faqs.answer: According to my research, depending on the specialization, obtaining a B.Sc. at Radha Govind University has different costs. The following are the costs for the university's particular B.Sc. programs: Nursing B.Sc .:- The entire cost of tuition for Radha Govind University's B.Sc. in Nursing is INR 3.60 Lakh. B.Sc. in Agricultural Science : The entire cost of tuition is INR 1.60 Lacs for this programme. The tuition and one-time admittance fee are included in the fees shown above.

faqs.question: Is pursuing MBA at Radha Govind University expensive?
faqs.answer: Radha Govind University charges between Rs 1.5 and Rs 2 Lacs in year MBA tuition. When you consider that the prices for many other private colleges can range from INR 5 to 15 Lacs per year, this seems really reasonable. At RGU, hostel and mess fees range from Rs 80,000 to Rs 1 Lacs per year. Additionally affordable are several hostel possibilities. An additional Rs 10,000–15,000 might be spent a year on books, materials, assignments, and other academic costs. Living expenses in larger cities like Delhi and Mumbai would be higher if taking out an education loan as opposed to smaller ones. A two-year MBA degree at RGU comes with a relatively reasonable total cost of about Rs 4-6 Lakhs. Scholarships are available from Radha Govind University to MBA applicants who demonstrate merit, which helps lower tuition.

hostel_campus.college_name: Radha Govind University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

reviews.review_heading: If you want only a degree, you will definitely take admission.
reviews.review_text: In my department, the basic facilities like classrooms, labs, and Wi-Fi are available, though not at the level of top colleges. Classrooms are spacious but could use more modern equipment. Labs are functional with the necessary instruments and computers, but sometimes lack the latest upgrades. The library has a decent collection of books and study materials, along with a digital section for reference.

reviews.review_heading: Best college in the Ramgarh area.
reviews.review_text: The hostel mess and canteen provide the best food for students, and medical facilities are also available.

reviews.review_heading: If you want only a degree this is a good choice but if you want skills you have to look at another.
reviews.review_text: The college provides Wi-Fi, laboratories, classrooms, a library, and hostels. The quality of food in the mess and canteen is satisfactory. Medical facilities are also available, and there are sports and games offered on campus. The college is green, beautiful, and clean, although the toilets are below average. There is a swimming pool, and buildings are well-maintained, though the college is undergoing further construction.

reviews.review_heading: I want to write this review because I want to share the information about my college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure of our course are good. Wi-Fi is not so good in our classrooms. But the lab is not so good as per fee structure. Classrooms are good and library is nice. The structure of hostel is the worst. In our college, there is discrimination between boys and girls hostel.

reviews.review_heading: University provides the best quality of infra.
reviews.review_text: Best in infrastructure of college. The library is best, functioning with a silent area. Wi-Fi is available 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. I am a hosteler. Classrooms are best and labs are wonderful. All is developing and giving the best quality for students. The total blocks of the university are divided into 8 blocks and it is a big campus.

reviews.review_heading: This college is the best college to complete your graduation.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available in our college are good, and the labs and classrooms are nice. In my hostel, college Wi-Fi is available. But the quality of food is the worst food I have ever eaten in my life. Medical facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Honest review of Radha govind university Ramgarh.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. Classrooms are large and comfortable, with blackboards and benches. Labs are present and well-equipped with various lab equipment. The library has many books. Wi-Fi is not available in classes. The hostel is average, with average food. Wi-Fi is available in the hostel, and a personal study table is provided. There is no canteen. Sports are only for B.P.Ed. students, but medical help is provided when needed.

reviews.review_heading: Genuine Review of University.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good, there is a facility for swimming pool and swimming sports competitions are held as well. Wi-Fi is available for all the students. The classrooms are very good. A canteen facility is available, but only for fast food is provided. Sports ground is available for cricket, football, badminton, and basketball.

reviews.review_heading: Yes I am absolutely satisfied because of faculty, good placements and really good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructural facilities of our college are highly modernized and full of technology. Hostel facility in our college is very good. There was home like environment. Sports, games facilities are also very good. Many students from our college get a chance to represent the college at a national level.

reviews.review_heading: It provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi but only for staff use, classrooms are good, and the library has books regarding professional courses. It does not have books for chemistry honors. They have books for law. The hostel is good, and mess is average. The food is good. For sports only for B.P.Ed students for others on competition and sports day.

reviews.review_heading: This college is good for students.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructures of course is very well they occupy many space they have swimming pool gym dance classes and much more hostel are not to B.Ed or not to good there are many rooms in the hostel but in one room they have allowed 5 years student at least.

reviews.review_heading: Radha govind University, ramghar. Jharkhand.
reviews.review_text: Facilities were good. Infrastructure was average. Quality of hostel was average. Boundary of the campus was good. Campus was big. There is a big playground where students can play. I have lots of fabulous memories and good friends and I still miss them.

reviews.review_heading: The college has good faculty members, and average infrastructure
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and the library are good. There is no Wi-Fi available in my department. I did not stay in the hostel. The sports and games facilities are average. Overall, the college infrastructure is basic, and the hostel facilities seem poor based on what I have heard, but I didn't stay there personally.

reviews.review_heading: If you are looking for only a degree, go for it.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms are spacious and well ventilated. There is a projector board also available. Wi-Fi and internet are also available. Our Computer Science department provides the necessary facilities to support learning and practical exposure. We have well equipped computer labs with internet connectivity for coding and project work, classrooms with projectors for interactive teaching, and access to the central library with computer Science textbooks. The campus has Wi-Fi connectivity, and students mak...

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Absolutely satisfied; great college.

review_content.Placements: Most of the students who pass out from our polytechnic end up taking higher studies in engineering or other fields, but a high level of students have been placed from our college. Internships are also really great; sometimes students get placed in the companies where they did their internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is pretty great; we have adequate access to labs, and the classrooms are situated in areas with plenty of sunlight and air. We have four labs for the CS department. Overall, the infrastructure is pretty good and useful for all the students.

reviews_list.batch_info: Diploma in Apparel Designing & Fabrication Technology - Batch of 2026
reviews_list.review_title: Yes the college is really very good and peaceful environment to study .

review_content.Placements: Among the students, 75% got placed in this course. The highest placement offered is 7 LPA, the lowest is 4 LPA, and the average placement is 6 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: We can get all facilities and infrastructure available for the course. They have a very good Wi-Fi facility, and the labs contain many pieces of equipment. The classroom is also maintained very clean and well, and the library contains a large variety of books.
review_content.Faculty: Yes, the teachers are helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. The teachers have a friendly relationship with students, and they explain the topics both practically and theoretically, making it easy for students to understand. They also have a huge amount of experience in the subjects they teach.

review_summary.college_name: M.S.Ramaiah Polytechnic Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electronics & Communication Engineering - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with joining this college.

content.Placements: Above 60% of students get placements in our college. The highest salary package offered is 5 LPA. The lowest salary package offered is 2 LPA. Above 80% of students got good placements in companies. All students are satisfied with their placements after completing their education at this college.
content.Infrastructure: The hostel facility is very good. The food is clean and tasty. Daily classrooms and labs are maintained clean and well. A housekeeper maintains every class daily. The canteen is also maintained very clean.
content.Faculty: Semester exams are easy because our teachers teach topics very well. We have rights to question them. All of them are well-educated and knowledgeable. They repeat topics 2 or 3 times until we understand topics of each chapter. All students get more knowledge about the industry.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical & Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Some of the faculty are a total headache; others are good. Like I said, there are no placements.

content.Placements: To be honest, there are no placements, but they provide internships from the college because we have to do an internship for the 6th sem. The top recruiting companies are ABB, Siemens, and Balaji Automations. Every single student got an internship. I got in Alpha, others got in ABB, and some got in Balaji Automations.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi is pretty good, and labs, classrooms are well maintained. All facilities are available in the lab. As I'm studying E&E, we have all components available in the lab. In the library, we have more than 8000 books. The canteen is amazing, and in sports, we have everything.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied; great college.

content.Placements: Most of the students who pass out from our polytechnic end up taking higher studies in engineering or other fields, but a high level of students have been placed from our college. Internships are also really great; sometimes students get placed in the companies where they did their internships.
content.Infrastructure: Infrastructure is pretty great; we have adequate access to labs, and the classrooms are situated in areas with plenty of sunlight and air. We have four labs for the CS department. Overall, the infrastructure is pretty good and useful for all the students.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Apparel Designing & Fabrication Technology - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Yes the college is really very good and peaceful environment to study .

content.Placements: Among the students, 75% got placed in this course. The highest placement offered is 7 LPA, the lowest is 4 LPA, and the average placement is 6 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: We can get all facilities and infrastructure available for the course. They have a very good Wi-Fi facility, and the labs contain many pieces of equipment. The classroom is also maintained very clean and well, and the library contains a large variety of books.
content.Faculty: Yes, the teachers are helpful, qualified, and knowledgeable. The teachers have a friendly relationship with students, and they explain the topics both practically and theoretically, making it easy for students to understand. They also have a huge amount of experience in the subjects they teach.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical & Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Yes absolutely, in my college we have very good facilities .

content.Placements: In my Ramaiah Polytechnic College, all students get 80 percent, but a few members will get 100 percent; it is the luck of those students. In my Ramaiah Polytechnic, if you take 80 percent, it will be considered average. I have to aim for a good job to settle in my life.
content.Infrastructure: In my Ramaiah Polytechnic College, there are many facilities, so all members will come and seek admission. All staff members are very senior and disciplined. My college is in a large location, and the hostel facilities are very good.

Data scientists typically pursue a master's Diploma or degree in data Science.Salary: The salary of a data scientist is usually higher than that of a data analyst. table.details: University of Mumbai, Council of Architecture

college_info.intro:
Pillai College of Architecture offers four popular courses: BArch, MArch, PhD, and BSc Interior Design. Of these, B.Arch has the most seats, with 80 seats, followed by BSc in Interior Design, with 60 seats.
The B.Arch course has the longest duration of five years, followed by the BSc programme, which is an Honours programme of 3+1 years. Except for BSc in Interior Design and PhD, candidates have to give an entrance exam to gain admission into the courses at Pillai College of Architecture.

faqs.answer: A:    The average salary package offered to architecture graduates can range from INR 3 Lacs to INR 8 Lacs per annum, depending on the location and employer. The college provides several opportunities to students for industry exposure, internships, and placement assistance by a dedicated placement team. Further, the college provides assistance to students in resume building, interview preparation, and job search strategies.
faqs.question: What is the average salary package offered to architecture graduates at Pillai College of Architecture?

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, as per the data available. Close to 22% of students have been able to get good placement assistance from the institute in the B.Arch programme. 61 students of the institute were placed in the B.Arch programme with a median salary package of INR 1.8 LPA. Therefore, candidates can rely on the college to get good placement assistance in the design and architecture sectors of the industry.
faqs.question: Does Pillai College of Architecture provide placement assistance?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: PICA Mumbai courses are varied while focusing on architecture and design-related courses. Candidates looking to apply for admission to Pillai College of Architecture can apply for the four courses available. The university offers courses, such as BArch, BSc in Interior Design, M.Arch, and PhD. The eligibility criteria and fees for each course vary as per the course's demands. Candidates can look at the table below to get an idea of the tuition fees, eligibility criteria, and entrance exams required for each course.

faqs.answer: A:    Pillai College of Architecture offers 165 seats for its programmes. B.Arch programme offers the most amount of seats in the university with 80 seats for the programme. BSc in Interior Design offers 60 seats, while 20 seats are offered by the M.Arch programme. For the PhD programme there is a provision of maximum five seats. Therefore, candidates applying for admission in the UG programmes will have a better chance of securing a seat in the institute as the UG programmes offer close to 140 seats in the institute.
faqs.question: What is the seat intake capacity of Pillai College of Architecture?

faqs.answer: A:     Pillai College of Architecture candidates should have cleared Class 12 with at least 50% aggregate marks from a recognised board. They must have Mathematics as a compulsory subject in the qualifying examination. Admission is provided on scores achieved in entrance exams like NATA. Academic and entrance test documents are both required to secure a place in the course.
faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for BArch at Pillai College of Architecture?

faqs.answer: A:    Pillai College of Architecture offers five seats in its PhD programme depending upon the PhD proposals recieved and the number of mentors/guides available for the programme. Candidates don't need to give any entrance exam to apply for PhD admission in the university. The university offers PhD positions in the field of design and architecture.
faqs.question: How many seats does Pillai College of Architecture offer for its PhD programme?

reviews_list.review_title: There is a good ambience, but there are no placements in our stream.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements in our stream here. However, there are placements in other streams. review_content.Infrastructure: There is a good infrastructure here. I like to spend time with friends, and also the campus is huge. There is a canteen and also sports grounds and a workshop. Overall, it is a great place for young students to spend time and study. Buildings are divided as per the courses, so there is no confusion.

admission_process.title: Pillai College of Architecture Admission Process 2025

paragraphs: Pillai College of Architecture admissionis both merit and entrance-based. The university considers entrance exams such as NATA, PETA etc. for admission to specific courses.Pillai College of Architecturecurrently offers multiple programmes at the UG PG, diploma and doctoral level. The courses are offered in streams of Architecure. Interested candidates can apply online for the preferred course.

The application form for Pillai College of Architecture is available online on the official website of the university. Candidates need to fulfil the eligibility requirement to apply for a course at the university. Below are some of the popularPillai College of Architecture coursesalong with their eligibility and selection criteria:
Course Name
Common Eligibility
Selection Criteria
The college offers admission to candidates based on merit or entrance exam scores. Candidates need to follow the below steps to get a seat in Pillai College of Architecture :
STEP 1: Pillai College of Architecture Application Process 2025

Candidates can fill out the application form on the official website of the college or download the form for offline submission. Aspirants must first register with the basic details to generate login credentials and then fill out the application form.

STEP 2: Selection & Merit List DeclarationThe process of selection depends on the marks scored in the qualifying exam or valid marks in entrance exams such asPETA,NATA,etc., based on courses. A merit list is published and issued by DTE Maharashtra, mentioning the names of selected candidates for the counselling and admission process.
STEP 3: Admission Confirmation & Fee Payment
Shortlisted candidates are informed about their selection. Candidates are further required to pay acourse feeto confirm their seat in the university.

The flagship programmes offered at Arena Animation Jayanagar include BSc, After 10 Diploma and Certificate programmes. individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Visual Effects and Graphics - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: It is a good place to learn about the animation industry.

content.Placements: There were 30 students in our batch, and later they divided according to the course we select. Salary offered for internships would begin from Rs. 5,000 per month. If a student is talented, he will get a salary offer Rs. 25,000 per month, initially. Almost all top companies visit our campus for recruitment. The salary package offered during my admission was 3.5 LPA. Every student got placed.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and computer lab are provided on campus. There was a playground on our new campus. Hostel facilities are not provided, students have to opt for PG if they are coming from a different place. The course is divided into a total of six semesters where you learn from basic to advance level, and the college works for 5-6 hours a day depending upon our batch.

paragraphs: Arena Animation Jayanagar admissionstarts with application followed by selection and admission confirmation.. Admission to the course is done on a first-come first-served basis. Aspirants are evaluated based on their application and merit for selection. Interested candidates can find the detailedArena Animation Jayanagar admission processin the steps below:
Arena Animation Jayanagar Application Process

Candidates can apply online on the website of the institute for any of the Arena Animation programmes. During the application process, students will also need to provide documents such as SSLC Certificate, PUC Certificate, Aadhaar Card, etc.
Arena Animation Jayanagar Selection Process

After filling the application form, aspirants need to wait for the admission letter. The institute selects candidates based on their performance in the last qualifying exam. For some of the courses, students may have to appear for PI round.
Admission Confirmation
Once the selection process is over, selected students have to pay the course fee to confirm their admission to the institute.

college_info.intro: Alard University offers three-year BBA, BSc, BA, and other courses to students at the undergraduate level. At the postgraduate level, Alard University Pune offers one to two-year MA, MSc, and MBA courses to students. The university also offers PG diplomas and PhD courses to students. The flagship programme offered at Alard University is the BTech. The institute provides this programme to students at the undergraduate level. The university offers the BTech programme for a duration of 4 years with a comprehensive curriculum. Alard University courses strive to enhance the learning experience of students to prepare them for the industry. Below mentioned are some of the courses, along with the Alard University fees and their respective eligibility:

placements.overview:
As per the latest report, over 8,800 students were placed from the 2024 passing-out batch. The highest and average package offered during Alard University placements 2024 stood at INR 50 LPA and INR 6 LPA, respectively. The top recruiters of Alard University placements 2024 included TCS, Axis Bank, Amul, Cognizant, Mother Dairy, Pantaloon, Accenture, etc.

The participating recruiters presented various new-age job offers to the batch 2024 of courses such as BTech, MBA, MCA, BPharma, etc.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Alard University offers good placements annually for courses like BTech, MBA, MCA, BPharma, etc. The key highlights of Alard University placements 2024 are tabulated below:ParticularsPlacement Statistics (2024)the highest packageINR 50 LPAAverage packageINR 6 LPATotal students placed8,800+Total recruiters300+Internships575+

faqs.answer: A:    Alard University admits students on an entrance basis for its BDes programme. Students seeking to get into this course must have completed Class 12 or equivalent with a minimum aggregate of 55% (50% for reserved categories) from a recognised board. Alard University BDes admission is entrance-based. Aspirants need to provide a valid score in any of the following exams; UCEED/ NIFT/ NID DAT/ AIEED/CUET/ FDDI AIST/ AEST Entrance Test.
faqs.question: Who is eligible for Alard University BDes admission?

faqs.answer: A:    The fee for the popular courses offered by Alard University are as follows:BTech: INR 7.8 Lacs to 9 lakhBSc: INR 3.8 Lacs to 5 lakhBCA: INR 4.4 lakhBDes: INR 6 Lacs to 10 lakhCandidates who clear the admission process and get the final admission offer are eligible to pay the course fee.
faqs.question: What is the fee for the popular courses at Alard University?

faqs.answer: A:    Alard University MBA eligibility requires students to pass graduation from a recognised university with a minimum aggregate of 50% (45% for reserved category). Additionally, candidates need to provide a valid score in any of the following exams; CAT/ MAT/ XAT/ PERA/ MH-CET/ CUET/ CMAT/ AEST. The final selection is done on the basis of the candidate's performance in GDPI conducted by the university. Eligible students can apply for Alard University MBA admissions by visiting the official website of the university:
faqs.question: Who is eligible for Alard University MBA admission?

faqs.answer: A:    Alard University MBA admission is entrance-based. Students need to provide a valid score of accepted test to be eligible for admission. However, CAT is not the only test that the university accepts. Students can also provide valid scores obtained in other management entrance tests, such as MAT/ XAT/ PERA/ MH-CET/ CMAT, etc. Alternatively, candidates can appear for the Alard University's entrance test as well. Hence, yes, you may get admission into the MBA course offered at Alard University without appearing for the CAT exam provided you have cleared any of the other accepted exams.

reviews_list.review_title: Ok ok college Placement record are not good

review_content.Placements: In 2024 I passed out. I didn’t find the college that good. Placements are 3.5/10, and the location isn’t great either. In this college, not many companies come; only one or two companies come in a year. Placement was not good. In this college, companies like Advance, IKS, and Take Care Health Solution come—just two or three companies, not many.
review_content.Infrastructure: Okay college, but no Wi-Fi. Sports facilities are not good, so children don’t enjoy them, and the food isn’t good, etc. Also, the facilities provided include labs, classrooms, and a library. review_summary.college_name: Alard University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: No college is very good. I got internship at this college.

content.Placements: Best college for B.Tech 60 out of 55 students are placed. The best college for CSE faculty is also very helpful. All events are celebrated, and the college also provides a internship to every student, and many companies hire many students, and 2 or 3 companies have partnered with the college.
content.Infrastructure: College building area is clean and in touch with the hostel. Hostel fees are also in our budget. The hostel is cleaned daily, and the mess is also very clean and hygienic. The hostel for boys and girls is separate, so no one can interfere with both. It also provides a study table and many more functions celebrated in the hostel.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It is the best college for sports.

content.Placements: Placements in this college are pretty decent. They do not have internships, but they do have some companies that offer paid internships. It's not good for internships, but they are good if you only want a degree. Only 2-3 people in a classroom get the opportunity.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty good as they have nice facilities, such as PCs, and all facilities are good. There are large classrooms for every student to sit in. The canteen facilities are also pretty nice, and sports are nice, as there is a huge turf which is best for sports.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: Ok ok college Placement record are not good

content.Placements: In 2024 I passed out. I didn’t find the college that good. Placements are 3.5/10, and the location isn’t great either. In this college, not many companies come; only one or two companies come in a year. Placement was not good. In this college, companies like Advance, IKS, and Take Care Health Solution come—just two or three companies, not many.
content.Infrastructure: Okay college, but no Wi-Fi. Sports facilities are not good, so children don’t enjoy them, and the food isn’t good, etc. Also, the facilities provided include labs, classrooms, and a library. Many more activities are conducted for study. Many kinds of games are available, like football, cricket, throw ball, etc.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: The college is pretty good in overall perspectives.

content.Placements: Placements are pretty good in the college. They provide placements in major companies like Cipla. The average package is about 15,000/month. One may get placement in the industrial sector. There are also placements for study labs related to pharmacy. Overall, the college is good in terms of placement.
content.Infrastructure: Classrooms and all the infrastructure are built in a modern way, keeping in mind the growing technology. They provide Wi-Fi on every floor of the college. Proper amenities are also provided for the library. Hostel rooms are average, and the food is of good quality.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good infrastructure and campus with sports ground and facilities. Good placements this year.

content.Placements: About 30–40% of the students secure placement through campus drives. It depends on your skills and knowledge whether you get selected or not. The package mainly depends on the job position and the company, but the lowest package can be around 3-4 LPA. Reputed companies like Glenmark, Advantmed, and IKS conduct campus drives. Most of the students obtain internships through the college, which helps them gain industrial knowledge. You can get jobs such as QC, QA, MR and medical coder.
content.Infrastructure: Things I like about college are the campus and the sports field. They have nets for cricket and football grounds, as well as sports equipment. Wifi is available on every floor and in the library. The classrooms are average and could be better. The labs need significant improvements; sometimes, chemicals are not available for practicals. The library is good, with a reading room and a wide selection of pharmaceutical-related books. Most students prefer PG accommodations over the hostel due to the poor quality of food and high fees.

admission_overview.college_name: Alard University Admission 2025: Courses, Fee, Eligibility and Last Dates

admission_overview.title: Alard University Admission Overview 2025
admission_overview.description: Alard University admission is a mix of both merit and entrance. The university offers several programmes at undergraduate, postgraduate, and diploma levels. These courses are offered across multiple fields, such as Law, Technology, Engineering, Management, Science, etc. Alard University accepts valid scores of relevant entrance exams, in addition to conducting its own entrance test (AUSET) to shortlist the candidates. The admission and application process for the courses offered at the university mainly commences online. Interested students can read the following article to know all about the courses, eligibility, selection criteria, and other admission-related information for Alard University Pune.

eligibility_selection.title: Alard University Eligibility & Selection 2025
eligibility_selection.description: Alard University course admission is subject to clearance of the preset eligibility criteria. Candidates looking to apply for UG courses must have passed Class 12 or equivalent in the relevant stream. Similarly, for PG admissions, students need to have completed graduation in the relevant field. The university offers multiple courses, in full-time and regular modes. Students can either provide a valid score of any of the accepted entrances or appear for the Alard University Scholarship and Entrance Test (AUSET). Aspirants can check out the following table to know about the detailed eligibility and selection criteria for some of the popular Alard University courses:

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 or equivalent with relevant subjects from a recognised board
Graduation with a minimum aggregate of 50% (45% for reserved category) from a recognised university/ institute
courses_table.selection_criteria: CAT/ MAT/ XAT/ PERA/ MH-CET/ CUET/ CMAT/ AEST + GDPI

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 with 40% to 45% in the Science stream with Physics, Chemistry, and Biology/Mathematics subjects

Class 12 with 40% to 45% in the Science stream with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects and Chemistry/ CS/ Electronics/ IT/ Biology/ Informatics Practices/ Biotechnology/ Technical Vocational subject/ Agriculture/ Engineering Graphics/ Business Studies/ Entrepreneurship as optional subjects
courses_table.selection_criteria: JEE Mains/ MH-CET/ AEST entrance test

courses_table.eligibility: Class 12 or equivalent with a minimum aggregate of 55% (50% for reserved categories)
courses_table.selection_criteria: UCEED/ NIFT/ NID DAT/ AIEED/CUET/ FDDI AIST/ AEST Entrance Test

paragraphs: The admission procedure for Alard University Pune involves multiple steps, such as registration, selection, and admission confirmation. Students must ensure that they meet the admission criteria of the desired programme before applying. The admission process commences online. Interested students can refer to the steps explained below to completeAlard University admission process:
Step 1: Alard University Application Process
Students can apply for the course of choice by visiting the university's official website and filling out the application form available online.
Step 2: Alard University Selection Rounds

The university shortlists candidates based on several parameters, such as entrance exam scores, academic merit, GDPI performance, etc. For certain courses, students need to either provide valid entrance exam scores or appear for the entrance test conducted by the university. Further, admission to certain courses, such as MBA also required candidates to appear for the university-level GDPI rounds.
Step 3: Alard University Admission Confirmation
Selected students need to pay the admission fees to secure their spot at the university.

placement_data.title: Alard University Placement overview
paragraphs: As per the latest report, over 8,000 students were placed from the 2024 passing-out batch. The highest and average package offered during Alard University placements 2024 stood at INR 50 LPA and INR 6 LPA, respectively . More than 300 recruiters participated and presented various new-age job offers to the batch 2024 of courses like BTech , MBA , MCA , BPharma , etc. The top recruiters of Alard University placements 2024 included TCS, Axis Bank, Amul, Cognizant, Mother Dairy, Pantaloon, Accenture , etc.

Alard University has a Placement team that provides placement assistance to all of its students. The placement process at Alard University includes a comprehensive pre-placement training and skill development program for the students.

reviews.review_heading: No college is very good. I got internship at this college.
reviews.review_text: College building area is clean and in touch with the hostel. Hostel fees are also in our budget. The hostel is cleaned daily, and the mess is also very clean and hygienic. The hostel for boys and girls is separate, so no one can interfere with both. It also provides a study table and many more functions celebrated in the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college for sports.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is pretty good as they have nice facilities, such as PCs, and all facilities are good. There are large classrooms for every student to sit in. The canteen facilities are also pretty nice, and sports are nice, as there is a huge turf which is best for sports.

reviews.review_heading:
Ok ok college 
Placement record are not good
reviews.review_text: Okay college, but no Wi-Fi. Sports facilities are not good, so children don’t enjoy them, and the food isn’t good, etc. Also, the facilities provided include labs, classrooms, and a library. Many more activities are conducted for study. Many kinds of games are available, like football, cricket, throw ball, etc.

reviews.review_heading: The college is pretty good in overall perspectives.
reviews.review_text: Classrooms and all the infrastructure are built in a modern way, keeping in mind the growing technology. They provide Wi-Fi on every floor of the college. Proper amenities are also provided for the library. Hostel rooms are average, and the food is of good quality.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure and campus with sports ground and facilities. Good placements this year.
reviews.review_text: Things I like about college are the campus and the sports field. They have nets for cricket and football grounds, as well as sports equipment. Wifi is available on every floor and in the library. The classrooms are average and could be better. The labs need significant improvements; sometimes, chemicals are not available for practicals. The library is good, with a reading room and a wide selection of pharmaceutical-related books. Most students prefer PG accommodations over the hostel due to the ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of Alard University.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is available on each floor and library. They have provided internet rooms consisting of computers. Separate labs are available for each respective subject. Classrooms have cameras and modern-sized computer-based boards. Each floor consists of water purifiers. We have well-maintained sports turf which is available from 9 AM - 5 PM.

reviews.review_heading: It is an average college for studies but good for sports.
reviews.review_text: The facilities available in my college include laboratories, computer labs, classrooms, and digital boards for an advanced education system. The library is a bit noisy. The college has a good playground with artificial grass (turf), and sports are played daily.

reviews.review_heading: Good infrastructure but dissatisfied by the placement cell.
reviews.review_text: The hostel is available, but the canteen food is pathetic, the medical infrastructure is poor, the labs are not fully equipped, the turf football ground is on campus, but they will not allow students to play there, and Wi-Fi is not available in college. The library and sitting areas are good.

reviews.review_heading: This college was above my expectations in terms of faculty and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The facilities and infrastructure available for the CSE course at the Alard Group of Institutes are good enough. Students have access to computer labs for programming. Necessary facilities like Wi-Fi, library, canteen, sports, medical, etc., are available on the college campus. All these facilities are properly managed by the college management. Hostel facilities are also available for the students.

reviews.review_heading: It is a good college in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: The classes are good and the campus is clean and green. There is a big turf ground for students to practice various games. Various sports are conducted here and the development of the student is taken care of at each point. The mess is available, also various sports activities are conducted. The college rooms have a projector and various other gadgets to help the student understand better.

reviews.review_heading: It has well-equipped laboratories, a Wi-Fi campus, and a well-resourced library.
reviews.review_text: Our college has the best library, high-tech labs, and classrooms. The hostel is average. A canteen and cafeteria are available, and there is a big football ground. Being part of ACEM made my life easy. Staff members and teachers helped me not only with my studies but also with my social life. I am looking for the best part of my life with ACEM.

reviews.review_heading: It is one of the good colleges, but it can be better.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is average. The hostel facility is average. Our college provides workshops, playgrounds, and well-managed classrooms. There is a library with many important books which will definitely help you to study.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, it is a great institute for a great beginning of a successful career.
reviews.review_text: The college provides all the necessary facilities very efficiently. All the basic needs are taken care of in a good way and willing. Common needs such as Wi-Fi, air-conditioners, purified drinking water, sanitary facilities, etc., are possible to acquire very easily.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The industry lab is good and clean with working equipment. In the library, all reference books are available. The quality of facilities is available in the hostel like reading rooms. Good quality of food is available in mess and canteen. Many sports are available for students.

reviews.review_heading: It has good classrooms and green environment.
reviews.review_text: The college has centrally air-conditioned classrooms with Wi-Fi-enabled LCD projectors, tutorial rooms, and a library. The college is endowed with renovated hostels and medical support systems. The quality of hostel facilities is very good. Good mess facilities are provided to all students.

college_info.college_name: Samskara Acadmy

highlights.summary:
Samskara Acadmy admissions 2023-24 are open for all courses. Interested candidates can apply through the official website.

Samskara Acadmy established in August 2018, has its registered office at Koregaon Park, Pune, Maharashtra, India. The academy is into the Service of Education, to help teenagers and youth uplift their passion and preserve their ethical values to improve their core competencies. The academy offers various kinds of degrees, diplomas, professional, certifications and software courses. The students have various kinds of flexibility when it comes to mode of education, batch type & timings etc. The skill knowledge partner of Samskara Acadmy is Sandip University. Samskara Acadmy has an educational tie-up with ACCA to offer International Professional Certificate in Accounts & Finance. It is a franchise partner of Tally Education. Some of the major highlights of the institute are mentioned below:

Samskara Acadmy Pune offers a three-year full-time degree programme under various specialisations along with the diploma and certificate programmes in the field of Fashion, Event, Interior, Animation & VFX, Finance & Accounts. Candidates applying to all the programmes offered by the institute are selected on merit basis. The eligibility criteria along with the duration for Samskara Acadmy courses are mentioned below:

Read more: Samskara Acadmy Pune Courses and Fees 2023

Candidates seeking admission to various programmes can apply in online, hybrid and offline modes. Candidates can visit the official website of the institute and apply online. Candidates willing to opt for the offline mode can download the application form from the official website. Candidates applying to the programmes offered by the Samskara Acadmy are selected based on the availability of seats.

Read more: Samskara Acadmy Pune Admission 2023

Samskaara has its very own dedicated placement cell to provide 100% placement assistance to its students. It has achieved 97% placements for its students and over 300 companies have visited the campus for the placements. The institute conducts various workshops, mock interviews, industrial visits and much more to make students industry-ready.

Read more: Samskara Acadmy Pune Placements 2022

highlights.summary: A few more updates are given below:

college_info.intro:
NIELIT Aurangabad offers BTech, Diploma, MTech, and certification programs to interested candidates. The admissions are made through the entrance exam. For BTech, JEE Main entrance exam is required, MTech admissions are made through the GATE entrance exam followed by CCMT counselling, however, admission to a diploma can be made through merit upon meeting the NIELIT Aurangabad eligibility criteria. Given below is the list of popular programmes offered at NIELIT Aurangabad:
For more details about courses of NIELIT Aurangabad, check out below video:

faqs.answer: A:    Some of the leading companies that visited the institute campus in the past few years' placements are mentioned below:NIELIT Aurangabad Placements: Top RecruitersEndurance Technologies LimitedMAN Energy SolutionsGrind Master Machines Private LimitedGlobal Websoft TCSGodrejSterlite TechnologiesVarroc ExcellenceVideocon GroupSiemensBoschAdvent Global Solutions
faqs.question: Who are the top recruiters at NIELIT Aurangabad placements?

faqs.answer: A:    After completing the education in Electronics Engineering, some of the students opt for a Master’s programme in specialisations like Telecommunication, Microelectronics & VLSI Design, Signal Processing, Wireless Communication, Embedded Systems, Robotics, etc. While the others join the Core Engineering companies, where they get to work as Design Engineer, ASIC Engineer Trainees, Junior Embedded Engineers or Network Support Engineer. Students can also opt for non-core jobs as Quality Analyst
faqs.question: What are the career opportunities after completing Electronics Engineering from NIELIT Aurangabad?

faqs.answer: A:    NIELIT Aurangabad has not released official placement 2025 data for the BTech course. As per some of the verified reviews on Shiksha, students have mentioned that the highest placement package is INR 25 LPA. Some of the leading companies that have been part of placements in recent years are TCS, Bosch, Bajaj Auto, etc.
faqs.question: What is the highest placements package offered at BTech course at NIELIT Aurangabad?

faqs.answer: A:    According to NIELIT Aurangabad JEE Main cutoff 2025, the General AI category cutoff stood between 46118 and 57153. Only CSE and EE cutoffs were published by the institute. Between these two, the highest cutoff possess by BTech in CSE at a Round 3 closing rank of 46118. Likewise, for the OBC AI category, CSE remained the most competitive course at a closing rank of 18150.
faqs.question: Which branch at NIELIT Aurangabad has the highest cutoff 2025?

faqs.answer: A:    Students are chosen for the B.Tech. programme in NIELIT , Aurangabad using a variety of techniques, such as:Joint Entrance Examination (JEE) Main: The National Testing Agency (NTA) administers the JEE Main, a national entrance exam, to candidates seeking admission to engineering and architecture programs at various Indian universities.State-level entrance exams: A few states hold entrance exams specifically for state-level engineering college admission. For instance, the Maharashtra Common Entrance Test (CET) is required for enrollment in the state's engineering institutes.Direct entrance: Depending on a candidate's Class 12 results, certain universities also provide direct admission to B.Tech. programs.Depending on the school and the program, different minimum percentiles are needed for admission to B.Tech. programs. But generally speaking, a percentile of 75% or higher is regarded as favorable for admission to top engineering colleges.
faqs.question: How do students get selected for B Tech and what is the minimum percentile required for NIELIT , Aurangabad ?

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2017
reviews_list.review_title: The best infrastructure and labs.

review_content.Placements: Ours was the first batch to graduate from this esteemed institute. At our time, there were only a few companies which had long-term committed tie-ups with our college with regards of placements/ internships and training purpose, which included Trimax, Verroc Industries, Sterlite Technology, and Videocon (DTH Manufacturing plant). Our college hosts many recruitment drives at various location in and around Aurangabad. Many students got an opportunity to work with the industrial experts in various industries in good cities like Pune, Nagpur, Bangalore (Tata). As the college is in Aurangabad which is considered as the main hub of industries (MIDC, Walunj), there is a fair chance of getting a good job in industries. The placement cell at NIELIT Aurangabad is capable enough to provide jobs not only to its students but also to students of other colleges as it conducts mega job fairs in this district.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Do not take admission here.

review_content.Placements: The first pass out batch for B.Tech was in 2019. The placement was around 5% with an average package of 25k per month. The companies that visited were local and mostly was employing for sales and marketing. In 2018, the number of placement increased to around 20% (most of the students didn't participate in the placement) with an average package of 18k per month. Companies like Naniko Pvt Ltd, Trimax and other local companies were there. Internship of six months is being provided in Siemens for the final year students. There is a placement cell in the college, but it is highly inefficient.
