admission_overview.college_name: National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Admission 2025: Cutoff, Application, Eligibility, Fees & Dates

paragraphs: Established in 1987, the National Institute of Electronics & Information Technology Aurangabad was founded with the objective of training students in the field of Information, Electronics and Communication Technology. The centre is co-located inside the campus ofDr Babasaheb Ambedkar Marathwada (BAM) University. The centre offers a varied range of nearly 35 short-term as well as long-term courses. BTech, MTech and PhD are the most sought-after courses of this centre and are affiliated with Dr BAM University.

NIELIT Aurangabad offers BTech, MTech, and Diploma programmes in Engineering and Technology. Further, it offers other short-term and long-term programmes in the fields of Technology, Science, Engineering, etc.
The list of majorNIELIT coursesoffered with the application status, eligibility and accepted entrance exam is presented below:
Eligibility Criteria
Entrance Exam
BTech in Electronics Engineering (System Engineering)
Class 12 pass in the relevant Science stream
JEE Mains/ CSAB Cousnelling
MTech in Electronics Design and Technology
BE / BTech with 60% (55% for reserved category) aggregate in electronics / Electrical / Telecommunication / Instrumentation
Diploma in Electronics Production and Maintenance
Class 12 pass with 35% aggregate in Mathematics and Science subjects
Entrance exam conducted by DTE
Download NIELIT Aurangabad admission brochure for formal programmes
NIELIT Aurangabad offers various degree, diploma and certificate programmes at UG, postgraduate and doctoral levels. The admission process of these courses is presented in brief below:

Candidates seeking admission to NIELIT Aurangabad's long-term courses must appear forNIELIT Exam. The duration of CHM programmes is six months and that of the rest of the programmes is one year. Candidates must satisfy the eligibility criteria of the course that they intend to apply for.

The centre also offers skill-oriented non-formal courses aligned with the National Skills Qualifications Framework (NSQF).Click here to view all the coursesalong with their eligibility criteria, duration and fees

lists: NIELIT Aurangabad BTech admission is based onJEE Mainrank, followed byJoint Seat Allocation Authority (JoSAA)counselling

Admission to non-formal courses is based on a candidate's performance inthe NIELIT Exam

courses_data.name: NIELIT Aurangabad BTech Admission 2025
cutoff_tables: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering
courses_data.description: NIELIT Aurangabad offers a 4-year BE/BTech programme at the UG level. Students who meet the minimum eligibility criteria and have a valid score on the JEE Main exam can apply. Here is a quick summary of the key highlights for the NIELIT Aurangabad BE/BTech programme, including its eligibility, fees and dates:

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission in NIELIT Aurangabad for BTech?
faqs.answer: No, there is no direct admission to BTech in NIELIT Aurangabad. You must qualify the JEE Main exam and go through JoSAA/CSAB counselling. Admissions are based on merit alone. There is no management quota or direct seat allocation.

faqs.question: Does NIELIT Aurangabad accept admission through JEE Main?
faqs.answer: Yes, NIELIT Aurangabad offers admission through JEE Main for BTech in Electronics Engineering. Shortlisted candidates need to attend JoSAA or CSAB counselling. It's a purely rank and seat-dependent admission. Early application is advised after results.

faqs.question: Is B.Tech costly at National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology aurangabad?

faqs.answer: Yes, NIELIT Aurangabad also provides M.Tech in Electronics Design and Technology. The programme is affiliated to Dr BAM University and approved by AICTE. Admissions are done on the basis of GATE scores. It is a specialised postgraduate course in electronics systems design.

faqs.question: What can students do after JEE Main session 2 result?
faqs.answer: After JEE session 2 is completed, only those candidates who are aiming for IITs need to start preparing for JEE Advanced after clearing JEE Main. Those who are above the 98th percentile should start preparing for JEE Advanced as soon as possible. Those below this, between the 95th and 98th percentile, should focus on attempting more mock tests and previous year question papers so that they have a better chance of clearing JEE Advanced

description: NIELIT Aurangabad cutoff 2025 for BTech, MTech, and other courses are available on this page. Candidates preparing for the next academic session can refer to the exam-wise sections below to view the NIELIT Aurangabad JEE Main cutoff 2025 along with other exams for different courses, rounds, and categories. Further exam-related updates are below:

NIELIT Aurangabad JEE Main cutoff 2025 for the first and last rounds are tabulated below for the General AI category students. In the last round, the NIELIT Aurangabad CSE cutoff 2025 was 110494 in the General category belonging to the AI quota. The cutoff ranks for core BTech branches are usually on the lower side, indicating competitive cutoff rank for admission.

For the General AI category students, the NIELIT Aurangabad B.E. / B.Tech cutoff 2025 ranged between 110494 and 166314 in the last round. Considering the lowest cutoff ranks of 110494 and 166314, B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering and B.Tech. in Electronics Engineering were the top two most competitive branches for admission among the students belonging to the General category.

JEE Main is the accepting exam for admission to the BTech and other UG courses. Qualified candidates are then eligible for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling process for final seat allocation. In this section, aspirants can find out all the important JEE Main 2026 dates to be eligible for admission.

JoSAA counselling 2025 is now over for admission to the Engineering courses offered at NIELIT Aurangabad. In 2025, the JoSAA counselling was conducted for up to six rounds. Further counselling rounds were conducted by CSAB to fill the vacant seats. Students who appeared for the JoSAA and CSAB counselling rounds can refer to the table below to view or download the round- and year-wise JEE Main cutoff lists for BTech admission at NIELIT Aurangabad to understand the cutoff trends.

This will help students to make an informed decision to get the right college and specialisation for admission. The options below are available for students belonging to the General AI quota and are in the range of the most competitive BTech specialisation of NIELIT Aurangabad. To refine their searches, students can also use the provided filters.

As per the GATE cutoff 2025, the top two most challenging M.E./M.Tech specialisations were M.Tech. in Artificial Intelligence and M.Tech. in Embedded System and VLSI Design with last round cutoff scores of 352 and 350, respectively, for the General AI quota. In the table below, candidates can view the branch-wise first and last round cutoff scores.

Tabulated below are the GATE CCMT last round cutoff scores for 2025, 2024 and 2023 across different rounds, categories and quotas. For the General AI quota, the last round cutoff scores varied between 350 and 352. While for the OBC category students, the final round cutoff scores were concluded between the range of 315 and 319 in the AI quota.

Candidates can refer to the table below to view some of the important GATE 2026 dates to be eligible for admission to the ME/MTech course. GATE is the accepting exam, followed by the CCMT counselling process for admission.

Tabulated below are the GATE cutoff lists across different rounds and years for ME/MTech admission at National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology, Aurangabad. The consolidated cutoff list will help students understand the past years cutoff trends.

Considering the last round of NIELIT Aurangabad CCMT cutoff 2025, core M.E./M.Tech branches, including Artificial Intelligence and Embedded System and VLSI Design, witnessed higher cutoffs for admission in the General category under the AI quota.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with our college and course.
reviews.review_text: We have very good labs for PCB designing. A VLSI lab, a 3D printing lab, a consumer electronics lab, an embedded system lab, a power electronics lab, a virtual networking lab, a fiber optics lab, etc., are available in our college. We have a very attractive hostel. We can access free Wi-Fi. It is available 24X7. The campus has a library.

reviews.review_heading: Very ideal place for learning modern electronics.
reviews.review_text: Excellent n pleasant infrastructure. Well-equipped laboratory providing best practical knowledge. In campus mess n hostel facilities for both boys and girls. Well-equipped library and plenty of well knowed technical magazines for keeping the students updated of new technologies.

reviews.review_heading: The best infrastructure and labs.
reviews.review_text: The college campus is located on the university campus. Also, the main market is at a distance of 5-4 km away from the institute. The campus is around 18 acres and it is considered as one of the biggest colleges for a single branch (only electronic system engineering is offered in this college no other branches are available). The campus is CCNA certified, and the complete campus is Wi-Fi enabled, there is a separate lab for almost every subject. Full freedom is given to the students to perform ...

reviews.review_heading: Do not take admission here.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is poor. Internet connectivity is a problem. The number of classrooms is not sufficient. The medical facility is provided. Sports and games facilities are good. The quality of labs is extremely bad, and there is a lack of components and space. The quality of food is the worst anyone can find in a college. Most of the students opted to live outside the hostel just because of the quality of food provided in the canteen. Hostel rooms are good but only for boys. The hostel is not ...

reviews.review_heading: Review of National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology, Aurangabad.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is quite good in terms of hostel, roads and streets. Classrooms and other amenities of this college are average. The college authorities provide Wi-Fi connection with some restrictions, but the speed is good.

reviews.review_heading: National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology Aurangabad
reviews.review_text: Very good. A lush green 18-acre campus and a perfect environment for better studies. The classrooms are spacious. The labs are very sophisticated and well equipped. we have got a CNC lab and a 3D printing lab which is the only lab that is located inside a college's premises all over India.

reviews.review_heading: It has a great scope for improvement in future, but as of now, performs mediocre.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is quite reputed. The campus is around 16-acres in the area with a lush greenery all around. There is just not a central Wi-Fi provided on the main college campus, but there are good labs like the software development lab or the model career centre with good internet and quite fast PCs. Most other labs are equipped with good components, and the PCB lab is the highlight of all. It offers opportunity to fabricate your own design on a PCB. The facilities like 3D printing, CNC mac...

reviews.review_heading: Be cautious before taking admission in this college. It could be dangerous for your career.
reviews.review_text:
The college infrastructure is really good. We have all the latest equipment and the only lab in the region for PCB manufacturing. All the components are provided for free if you want to do any project. All the lab assistants are really helpful.
The canteen is a real mess. The college is not able to manage a canteen for even 120 students. Daily, there is chaos over food quality and money.
You will not get any other eateries around or in the college. You have to walk 1.5 km even for getting a samo...

reviews.review_heading: College is quite good those who are interested in electronics.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure are not that much big but it's quite beautiful in particular seasons. Coming towards course it consists of various labs like digital electronics, analog electronics, power electronics, PCB, Embedded and IOT, Soc lab and done lab etc. Hostel is quite good. They provide good facilities and mess charges are 3600 per month for breakfast, lunch and dinner. Hostel charges are 10,500 per semester.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied because of the marks I scored but dissatisfied because of the faculty.
reviews.review_text: Our college does not provide public Wi-Fi facility. If you want to use the internet regarding your studies, then you can go to the computer lab. Classrooms are large, but the crowd is less. Classrooms are not well maintained. The library is good and comfortable. There is a clinic, but there is no doctor in it. Our college provides ground only in sports week.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.A.( Hons.) in Fashion Design - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Well-rounded experience with strong placements, supportive faculty, and good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: The highest package is 5-6 LPA, the lowest package is 2-3 Lacs, and about 70%-80% of students in our course secured internships through campus or personal efforts, with roles offered in export houses like designing. Students can also get internships in other states to gain more experience in export.
review_content.Infrastructure: Hostel infrastructure is generally satisfactory, the mess food is decent and hygienic though the variety and taste can sometimes be inconsistent, and the menu is pure vegetarian.
review_content.Faculty: Most of the faculty members are well qualified, with many holding Ph.D. degrees and experience, they are approachable, supportive, and willing to help students beyond class hours. The course curriculum is fairly updated and aligned with industry standards, and semester exams are moderately difficult.

review_content.Placements: Placements at Arka Jain University are quite good. Around 80 to 85 percent students from my batch got placed especially from CSE, ECE and management streams. The highest package offered is around 10 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA and the average package ranges between 4 LPA and 5 LPA. Some of the top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, Byju's, HCL, Infosys and ICICI Bank. 70 percent students also got internship opportunities in reputed organizations which help in gaining real industry exposure. The top roles offered in our course are software engineer, data analyst, sales executive, business development associate and operations manager.

course_faqs.question: What is the fee for MBA at Arka Jain University?
course_faqs.answer: Arka Jain University's MBA fee is INR 4 Lacs for two years. The fee is payable in semesterly instalments of INR 1 lakh. In addition to the programme fee, candidates are required to pay certain one-time fees of INR 12,000 at the time of admission. This is inclusive of the admission fee and security deposit. The mentioned fee is sourced from the official website of the university/sanctioning body. It is still subject to change and hence, is indicative.

overview_faqs.question: Is Arka Jain University campus safe?
overview_faqs.answer: Yes, Arka Jain University campus is safe for girls and boys. The college campus is located in center of Jharkhand. It has a good connection with roads and public transports. CCTV cameras are installed in the campus to keep a check on students safety

overview_faqs.question: Is it worth joining Arka Jain University?
overview_faqs.answer: The the highest and average package offered during Arka Jain University placements 2024 stood at INR 23 LPA and INR 3.2 LPA, respectively. Further, more than 500 companies visited the campus and 2000 job offers were made during Arka Jain University placements 2024. Further, companies such as Infosys, Tata Motors and Tech Mahindra visited the campus in recent past during Arka Jain University placements. Students can check detailed Arka Jain University placement stats here.

review_summary.college_name: Arka Jain University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: It has decent placements and top-notch infrastructure.

content.Placements: College is very good. 80 percent of students got placed. The highest package offered is 5 LPA. The average package offered is 2.5 LPA. Top companies like Tata Motors, Amazon, etc., hire students. 80 percent of students got internships from our course in companies. Roles like data analyst, junior data scientist, and software developer are offered in my course.
content.Infrastructure: Our college hostel is good. Facilities and infrastructure are good. It has the best Wi-Fi facility, labs, and good classrooms. It has the best library with a seating area. It is good to study. The hostel food is best compared to other private colleges. Sports and games are also good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science Engineering - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Decent placements and faculty members.

content.Placements: Around 70 to 80 percent of students get placed. The highest package is 6 LPA, the lowest package is 3 LPA, and the average package is 4.5 LPA. Companies like TCS, Infosys, Accenture, and Wipro recruit here. Top roles like Web Developer, Analyst, and Data Scientist are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities and infrastructure for my course Wi-Fi connectivity across the campus. Well-equipped labs for practical sessions. It has spacious classrooms with modern teaching aids. It also has a library with a good collection of books and journals. The hostel facilities are generally good with decent accommodation. The mess food is hygienic and varied.

individual_reviews.course: B.A.( Hons.) in Fashion Design - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Well-rounded experience with strong placements, supportive faculty, and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: The highest package is 5-6 LPA, the lowest package is 2-3 Lacs, and about 70%-80% of students in our course secured internships through campus or personal efforts, with roles offered in export houses like designing. Students can also get internships in other states to gain more experience in export.
content.Infrastructure: Hostel infrastructure is generally satisfactory, the mess food is decent and hygienic though the variety and taste can sometimes be inconsistent, and the menu is pure vegetarian.
content.Faculty: Most of the faculty members are well qualified, with many holding Ph.D. degrees and experience, they are approachable, supportive, and willing to help students beyond class hours. The course curriculum is fairly updated and aligned with industry standards, and semester exams are moderately difficult.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Electrical and Electronics Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: Best college of Jamshedpur.

content.Placements: Placements at Arka Jain University are quite good. Around 80 to 85 percent students from my batch got placed especially from CSE, ECE and management streams. The highest package offered is around 10 LPA, the lowest is 3 LPA and the average package ranges between 4 LPA and 5 LPA. Some of the top recruiting companies are TCS, Wipro, Byju's, HCL, Infosys and ICICI Bank. 70 percent students also got internship opportunities in reputed organizations which help in gaining real industry exposure. The top roles offered in our course are software engineer, data analyst, sales executive, business development associate and operations manager.

individual_reviews.course: BCA (Honours with Research) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Great infrastructure, but average faculty support.

content.Placements: 65 to 75 percent of students from our batch got placed through campus recruitment. Placement chances are better for students with strong technical and communication skills. The highest package is around 6 to 7 LPA (for students placed in reputed IT firms). The average package is around 3 to 3.5 LPA. The lowest package is 2 LPA (mainly in support or non-core roles).
content.Infrastructure: The college provides good infrastructure for the BCA course. The classrooms are spacious and equipped with projectors making learning more interactive. The computer labs have Wi-Fi, updated systems and necessary software tools to support programming and project work. The library is well-stocked with academic books, journals, and digital resources, which are very helpful for students.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for admission at Arka Jain University?

faqs.answer: Arka Jain University MBA admission is entrance-based. The university shortlists applicants for its MBA programme based on their performance in AJUCET conducted by AJU or any one of the accepted entrance exams. The university accepts the exam scores of various national-level entrance exams, such as CAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, etc. Candidates with a valid exam score in any one of these exams can apply for direct admission to the university, subject to the fulfilment of the AJU MBA eligibility criteria. Eligible candidates can apply online by visiting the university's official website. Alternatively, they can visit the university's campus to obtain, fill out and submit the application form.
faqs.question: How do I get admission to MBA at Arka Jain University?

faqs.answer: Communicate directly with the admissions office of Arka Jain University. In addition to providing you with an estimate of the anticipated eligibility requirements and admissions procedure, they may be able to offer you with more recent cut-off information, if that information is available. Scorecard analysis tools—which display percentile ranges of previous year's admissions to various universities—are available for some entrance tests, such as the MAT or CAT. You can get a ballpark idea of the anticipated cut-offs at Arka Jain University by using these tools for college rankings and popularity that are comparable to AJU.The amount of applications, the popularity of the programme, and the general difficulty of the admission exam are some of the variables that can cause cut-offs to change from year to year.Admittance is not guaranteed if one meets the minimum cutoff; interview scores, professional experience, and academic standing may also be taken into account.To improve your chances of acceptance, use the material that is available as a guide, but concentrate on getting well-prepared for the entrance exam and putting together a compelling application.
faqs.question: Where can a candidate find Arka Jain University cut off?

faqs.answer: Arka Jain University admission 2026 is currently open for various courses. The application process at ARKA Jain University Jamshedpur is conducted online or offline. Students can check the list of documents required for admission below:10th marksheet & certificate12th marksheet & certificateGraduation degree & marksheet (for PG admissions)Postgraduation degree & marksheet (for PhD admissions)No Objection Certificate from current employer in case the candidate is employed & applying for the PhD courseCharacter certificateMigration certificateEntrance test scorecard, wherever applicableRecent passport-size photographs
faqs.question: What are the documents required for admission at Arka Jain University?

paragraphs: Arka Jain University admissionsare primarily entrance-based followed by counselling. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at Arka Jain University is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Arka Jain University Application Process 2026

The mode of application is both online or offline. Candidates can visit the official website to apply online for course admission. However, students can also opt for offline application procedures. The application form for the general and SC/ ST categories is INR 1,000 and INR 500, respectively.
STEP 2: Selection

The university considers various entrance exam scores such as JEE Mian, CUET, MAT, XAT etc for admission to the BTech, BPharma among courses. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

After the release of Arka Jain University cutoff, aspirants with scores equal or above the cutoff are offered seats. The university also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theArka Jain University feeto confirm their seats at the university.

faqs.question: Can I get Arka Jain University, MBA with a 78% percentile in CAT?
faqs.answer: Yes, you have a lot possibilities to get a seat for MBA at Arka Jain University. Many candidates with possibly better percentiles on the CAT and other recognised tests, such as the MAT, CMAT, etc., apply to the programme. The cut-off scores may be higher for a particular specialisation you select because of stronger demand or smaller class sizes.In summary, achieving a 78th percentile on the CAT does not ensure admission, but it does place you in the competitive area. Applying with strength, performing well in GD & PI, and looking into other options can greatly improve your chances of being accepted into Arka Jain University's MBA programme.

placement_data.title: Arka Jain University Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: According to the official brochure 2025 released by the University, more than 110 students got multiple offers during Arka Jain University placement 2024. A total of 500 offers were also made during the placement drive 2024. The highest and average package offered in 2024 stood at INR 23 LPA and INR 3.2 LPA , respectively. The placement rate recorded during Arka Jain University placement 2024 was 71.08%.

The University has a dedicated placement cell that facilitates all types of placement-related activities. Meanwhile, an Annual Job Fair was held by the University wherein 3,800 students registered , 700 selections were made and 2,400 interviews conducted. The highest package offered in the Job Fair was INR 8 LPA.

hostel_campus.college_name: Arka Jain University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Arka Jain University provides well furnished separate spacious accommodation for both Girls & Boys. Hostels at Arka Jain University give a unique opportunity for an individual to network with a melange of cultures, passions and emotions. Jain College hostels are strictly vegetarian.

library.description: Arka Jain University provides access to the information needed to support the rigorous demands of a top-tier business school.In addition to housing a comprehensive print collection, the library offers a wealth of online information. The experienced staff of business librarians provides research training, individual consultations and email reference assistance to help Arka Jain University make the most effective use of library resources.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court, Billiards

The experienced staff of business librarians provides research training, individual consultations and email reference assistance to help Arka Jain University make the most effective use of library resources.

cafeteria.description: Our cafeteria is an all-you-care-to-eat cafeteria-style facility. It is also a perfect place for student’s hang-out over a cup of coffee after a stretched hour of classes and hours-long presentation, workshop etc. It sometimes becomes an ideal place to complete group assignments or do a presentation rehearsal. It is a strict vegetarian cafeteria.

hostel.description: Arka Jain University provides well furnished separate spacious accommodation for both Girls & Boys. Hostels at Arka Jain University give a unique opportunity for an individual to network with a melange of cultures, passions and emotions. Jain College hostels are strictly vegetarian.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volleyball Court, Billiards

labs.description: Available Facilities: Civil Engineering Lab, Computer Lab, Electrical Lab, Electronics Lab, Mechanical Lab

reviews.review_heading: It has decent placements and top-notch infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Our college hostel is good. Facilities and infrastructure are good. It has the best Wi-Fi facility, labs, and good classrooms. It has the best library with a seating area. It is good to study. The hostel food is best compared to other private colleges. Sports and games are also good.

reviews.review_heading: Decent placements and faculty members.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure for my course Wi-Fi connectivity across the campus. Well-equipped labs for practical sessions. It has spacious classrooms with modern teaching aids. It also has a library with a good collection of books and journals. The hostel facilities are generally good with decent accommodation. The mess food is hygienic and varied.

reviews.review_heading: Well-rounded experience with strong placements, supportive faculty, and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Hostel infrastructure is generally satisfactory, the mess food is decent and hygienic though the variety and taste can sometimes be inconsistent, and the menu is pure vegetarian.

reviews.review_heading: Best college of Jamshedpur.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of Arka Jain University is well maintained with modern classrooms, smart boards, well stocked central library, computer labs and dedicated laboratories for practical learning. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled and provides a good environment for academics as well as extracurricular activities. The hostel facilities are also comfortable with spacious rooms, 24/7 security, hygienic food in the mess and proper cleanliness. Sports facilities like a cricket ground, basketball court and g...

reviews.review_heading: Great infrastructure, but average faculty support.
reviews.review_text: The college provides good infrastructure for the BCA course. The classrooms are spacious and equipped with projectors making learning more interactive. The computer labs have Wi-Fi, updated systems and necessary software tools to support programming and project work. The library is well-stocked with academic books, journals, and digital resources, which are very helpful for students.

reviews.review_heading: Strong placements, modern infrastructure, and supportive faculty.
reviews.review_text: Arka Jain University provides modern infrastructure with Wi-Fi-enabled classrooms, well-equipped computers and Science labs, a central library with digital resources, and smart classrooms for effective learning. The campus has good hostel facilities with clean rooms, 24/7 security, and medical support. The mess offers hygienic food with a decent variety, while the canteen provides additional choices. Sports facilities include grounds for cricket, football, volleyball, indoor games, and a gym, en...

reviews.review_heading: Real image of the university.
reviews.review_text: Clean mess, there is a nursing room dedicated, there are 2-3 large grounds for playing, and every block has its own auditorium. The university engages in every sport and encourages students to participate, it even includes taekwondo, badminton, cricket, football, etc.

reviews.review_heading: Dissatisfied with its location. Well, not the location but the road is very bad.
reviews.review_text: Facilities are very nice. There are 6 blocks on the campus and it also has library with computers. Every student is allotted their email and Wi-Fi. The coursera app is free while the student registration is active which helps in skill development for students.

reviews.review_heading: The university is cost-effective but lacks in providing placements.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good for Journalism and Mass Communication.

reviews.review_heading: Best for placements and fests.
reviews.review_text: Facilities like multiple canteens and libraries are available. Non-AC classrooms are there. AC is present only in labs like java and C lab. Wi-Fi is available but it works very slowly. Network connection is the biggest drawback. There is high scope in sports. Food and medical facilities are good.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Arka Jain University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good but the classrooms don't have air-conditioners. Mostly the weather is humid so they should provide air-conditioners in classrooms. The mess is not good and hygiene is not maintained. Nescafe is also there in the college which you can have.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with college infrastructure and faculty.
reviews.review_text: The college provides various facilities like hostels, libraries, various playgrounds, and canteens. The quality of the hostel is very good, clean, and clear, and the food quality in the canteen is also very good. All the medical, sports, and games facilities are giving their best in their role.

reviews.review_heading: Our college provides great placements and has great faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure for our course is excellent, featuring modern classrooms, well-equipped labs, and a comprehensive library with ample resources. The hostel facilities are comfortable, with clean rooms and decent food in the mess. Medical facilities are accessible, and there are good options for sports and games promoting a balanced lifestyle.

reviews.review_heading: The roads of the campus are very nice.
reviews.review_text: A very nice infrastructure, having good classrooms, Wi-Fi facilities, projectors, and smart classes, was also provided to us on our campus. This campus, being a place of belongingness, helps us to reach our goal, and the development of this campus is just wonderful, I believe.

reviews.review_heading: This college is for rich people.
reviews.review_text: Overall, on the basis of infrastructure, it will get an A grade. Hostel facility is not at all good and is highly not recommended. Bus transportation is also not good. Bus drivers often drive the bus in an alcoholic condition, which leads to accidents. But the college doesn't take any action.

highlights.summary: Indian Institute of Crafts and Design admissions 2026-2027 are open for various courses such as BDes, MDes, and PG Diploma.

college_info.intro: Indian Institute of Crafts and Design offers BDes and MDes as its popular programmes. The Institute offers these programmes based on merit. Candidates can apply for the same through the official website of IICD. Indian Institute of Crafts and Design Jaipur offers BDes and MDes in specialisations such as Hard Material, Soft Material, Fired Material, Fashion Clothing, Jewellery, Crafts etc. Offering courses from 1 year to 4 years, IICD Jaipur offers a total annual intake of 260 students. To learn more about the IICD Jaipur popular programmes, check out the table below:

placements.overview: Indian Institute of Crafts and Design offers placement assistance. The Institute offers placement assistance by providing training and various collaborations. These partnerships facilitate foreign exchange programs, field or industry trips and internships.

faqs.answer: A:    Yes, Indian Institute of Crafts and Design have a placement cell. The placement cell of the Institute organises campus placement drives for Undergraduate and Postgraduate students. PPOs are also made during the internship drives.
faqs.question: Does Indian Institute of Crafts and Design have a placement cell?

faqs.answer: A:    The top recruiting sector during Indian Institute of Crafts and Design placements in recent times was Design Studios. The placement distribution in this sector was 25%. It was followed by Industry (Export / Manufacturing / Production Based) and Academics with 24% and 10% placement distribution.
faqs.question: Which is the top recruiting sector during Indian Institute of Crafts and Design placements?

faqs.answer: A:    IICD Jaipur is good in terms of placements. As per the official data, students of this Institute not only find placement in top Design firms but also start their own companies and work as entrepreneurs.
faqs.question: Is Indian Institute of Crafts and Design good in terms of placements?

faqs.answer: A:    Indian Institute of Crafts and Design alumni are placed in leading Design firms and Craft Industry. They are also working as Research Associates and Faculty Members in design institutions. In addition, many IICD alumni are working as entrepreneurs in companies such as Kanchan Arts, Studio Forge, Syahi, Rare Studios.
faqs.question: Where are Indian Institute of Crafts and Design alumni placed?

fees_and_eligibility.overview: Indian Institute of Crafts and Design offers diverse programmes at UG and PG levels in offline mode. The offered programmes can be chosen from stream such as Design. At the UG level, candidates have the provision to opt from courses such as B.Des and B.Voc. Whereas, at PG level, Indian Institute of Crafts and Design offers courses such as M.Des, PG Diploma and M.Voc. Indian Institute of Crafts and Design fee structure for all the courses is around INR 2,60,000 to 11,10,500.

faqs.answer: A:    To get into IICD for a MDes course, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. Students must pass graduation from Design and Architecture background. Indian Institute of Crafts and Design offers full-time MDes courses of two years' duration. Students can get into this course based on a valid IICD exam score/followed by PI.
faqs.question: What percentage is required for admission to M.Des at Indian Institute of Crafts and Design?

faqs.answer: A:    The fee range for the BDes programme at Indian Institute of Crafts and Design is INR 10.4 lakh. The fee structure is sourced from unofficial sources, hence indicative. The fee might cover various academic expenses like tuition fees, laboratory charges, examination fees, library fees, and other relevant charges. It is important to note that the fee structure is subject to change, and candidates are advised to refer to the official website of the university for the latest and most accurate fee structure.
faqs.question: What is the total tuition fee for B.Des at Indian Institute of Crafts and Design?

faqs.answer: A:    IICD BDes in Hard Material Design is a 4-year course. The Institute offers this course in full-time mode, in affiliation with Rajasthan ILD Skills University, Jaipur. The Indian Institute of Crafts and Design IICD offers BDes in Hard Material Design with a total tuition fee of INR 10.40 Lacs and hostel fees of INR 4.50 Lakh. Apart from this, there is a one-time payment which is for INR 18 K, making a total of INR 15.08 Lakh.
faqs.question: What is the fee for B.Des in Hard Material Design at Indian Institute of Crafts and Design?

faqs.answer: A:    The Indian Institute of Crafts and Design offers UG, PG and Diploma level programmes. The Institute offers these programmes in various specialisations such as Fashion Clothing Design, Jewellery Design, Crafts Communication etc. IICD offers these courses for a total tuition fee of INR 40 K to INR 11.11 Lakh. Therefore, to conclude, the IICD fee structure is not very costly, considering everything that a course offers.

answer.text: Indian Institute of Crafts and Design application forms are also available online. Candidates meeting the eligibility criteria can apply for the preferred course. Below are the steps to apply for admission:Step 1: Get registered at the official website (iicd.ac.in/) and fill in the following details.• Personal details: Fill in details like name, date of birth, gender, marital status, category (SC/ ST/ OBC/ General), nationality, domicile residence of Rajasthan state, mobile number, email ID, father's name, mother's name, mobile number (parents), email ID (parents), and family income per annum in rupees.• Address: Enter both correspondence and permanent address.• Preferences for entrance test centre: A maximum of THREE preferences (in order of priority) can be entered.• Class 12 or equivalent qualifications: In this section, candidates need to enter details such as passing year, stream, and board/ school name of Class XII.• Degree qualifications: Similar to details for 10+2 qualifications, here candidates can put the passing year, stream, and college/ university name of the bachelor’s degree.• Language known: Here, candidates need to specify their level of proficiency (speak/ read/ write) in Hindi and English languages.• Preferences for specialisation: Candidates need to put three preferences (in order of priority) for course specialisations.• Document uploading: Finally, candidates need to upload three documents – a photo, a Class 10 certificate, and photo ID proof. It may be noted that size of all three documents should be less than 4 MB. Also, the format of the documents should be jpg/ png/ pdf.

admission_process.title: Indian Institute of Crafts and Design Admission Process 2026

paragraphs: Indian Institute of Crafts and Design admissionsare completely entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at the Indian Institute of Crafts and Design is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Indian Institute of Crafts and Design Application Process 2026

The mode of application is an online procedure. Once all details are entered, candidates need to pay the IICD entrance exam 2026 application fee online (debit card/ credit card/ internet banking) or offline (via DD) mode.
Application Fee
Indian & SAARC National candidates
NRI & Foreign candidates

After paying the fee candidates need to enter payment details (such as payment ID/ DD number) on the application form and click the Submit button. The IICD entrance exam 2026 application form will be submitted successfully.
STEP 2: Selection

Students are selected based on the IICD entrance exam + PI. The exam has two parts - 1) Part A is a General Awareness, Creativity & Perception Test, while 2) Part B includes sub-parts -a)Material, Color & Conceptual Test, andb)Personal Interview.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The institute also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants must visit the institute to submit the documents and pay theIndian Institute of Crafts and Design feeto confirm their seats in the university.

ILAM India is a new-age institute that was established in 2008. ILAM has strong academic collaboration with Jagannath University. One of the top universities in Delhi, ILAM-Jagannath University provides job-oriented BSc, MSc & MBA courses with a 100% placement record. Some of the top recruiters of ILAM India are Spicejet, Indigo, British Airways, IGi Airport, and GMR. Students have received opportunities to work in major metropolitan cities and international countries like the UK, USA, and Singapore, among others.

Also, ILAM-JIMS is a better ranked university. The top recruiters at ILAM-JIMS were Tcs, air india, air Asia, ashok Leyl

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Aviation Management - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: Get an insight into what an aviation programme looks like in India.

review_content.Placements: We had a batch of 45 students, out of which around 30 students got placed. I won't vouch for the fact that the placements are too good to consider as a student, but still, the college did manage to get a higher number of students placed. The top recruiting companies were Indigo and Elebi.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was the only thing that was letting it grow. I mean, it's a community college and there are two buildings with a basketball court, but that's it. Even for sports week, we had to book grounds outside, let alone for the freshers and other guest lectures. I have no idea about the college hostel as I and most of my friends stayed in a PG.

reviews_list.batch_info: BBA in Logistics and Supply Chain Management - Batch of 2013
reviews_list.review_title: The review of Institute of Logistics and Aviation Management.

review_content.Placements: My experience with ILAM was very good. The faculty members are very helpful and genuine. I feel proud to be an Alumni of Institute of Logistics and Aviation Management. I got to learn lot many things. The placement record is the major highlight of the college. ILAM has a tie-up with big logistics and aviation companies. There are internships, workshops, presentations, guest lectures organized for the students. We got exposed to real-time industry situations. I am thankful to ILAM for providing immense opportunity to learn and grow.
review_content.Infrastructure: ILAM has a lush green campus spread over 52 acres in Delhi, and they have a tie-up with Galgotias University, Greater Noida. ILAM provides an infrastructure, surroundings, an ideal place to work, study, research and rejuvenate. All the classrooms are fully air-conditioned to create the right environment for learning and focused the discussion. The infrastructure consist of a Wi-Fi enabled campus with projectors. It is a well-known and established institute. Separate boys and girls hostel facilities are also provided.

Once the cutoff will be released, it will be uploaded on the website for the students to check. The student can check the cutoff according to which speciality he/she is applying for. No other source other than the official website should be trusted or relied upon. The institute does not upload cutoff on any other Website other than the official one.
faqs.question: Q: Where can a candidate find ILAM-JIMS cut off?

faqs.answer: To take admission at ILAM-JIMS for MBA program, a minimum cutoff of 75 percentile in order to enroll for the course is required. After that a final cutoff will be released based on the number of seats available and number of applications. If any student qualifies in the cutoff also, he/she can get the admission. Other than the entrance exam marks, a minimum of 50-55 percent in the graduation is also required in order to enroll for the program. So if any student wants to take admission, he/she should not only keep in mind the minimum cut off, but should try to get the best score in the entrance exam to get the admission without any problem.
faqs.question: Q: What are the cutoff marks required for MBA?

faqs.answer: At ILAM-JIMS, there is no entrance exam required for any course. If you want to get admission in MBA or PGDM courses, your score in undergrad is 50% and also 50% in standard 10+2. The eligibility criteria for BBA is that your score of 10+2 is 50%, and acceptable boards are CBSE and ISC. For the UG Diploma course, only 50% in 10+2.

review_summary.college_name: Premlila Vithaldas Polytechnic (PVP Mumbai) Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Diploma In Food Technology - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: The college has excellent facilities and teaching quality.

content.Placements: There are only 30-32 placements per batch, including direct second year. It's a 3-year course with 5th semester as an internship (4 months). Every student who's passed all the semesters and is clear with all exams can get an internship. If you took the course and teaching seriously and attended all classes, you are definitely industry-ready.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is average. Hostel facilities are good. Lab facilities are excellent. Extracurricular activities are held every month. All the staff are very helpful. Computers are very slow, but it's fine. Library facilities are available and excellent.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma In Electronics - Batch of 2016
individual_reviews.title: Good practical knowledge gained.

content.Placements: Got internship in Aplab Ltd and radix electrosystem. Not as a proper job. As I did not want to get one because wanted to go for further education. Yet I am carrying experiences of one year which makes my resume stronger than others. And provides me better understanding of the concept.
content.Infrastructure: Last building in the campus surrounded by green lush. Non noisy campus. It does not have a lot of canteen outside but every building has one. It has one consumer store which does not provide very good food so it's better to eat from college canteen and carry tiffins.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma In Electronics - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: The college with good placement, infrastructure, teaching faculty members.

content.Placements: The college had introduced a good placement program for the students. The companies like TATA, Reliance Energy, Sony were part of the program. Approximately, 20 students were placed from a batch of 150students, and 30% of students got placed from the entire college. The highest stipend was Rs. 15000/- whereas the lowest stipend was Rs 7000/- offered to the students.
content.Infrastructure: The college has a great campus. It has a library with centralized air conditioning, even the classroom is good. The college has a gymkhana and also has various sports equipment both indoor as well as outdoor games for the students. The canteen is also well maintained, and the food in there is yummy one must try everything at least once.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma in Jewellery Design and Manufacture - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Highly recommended for career in designing.

content.Placements: The department provides 100% job placements. It also helps in securing internship to all the students of the department in a reputed company if the student is unable to find one on its own. The students can take up different job roles such as Designers, Merchandisers, Manufacturers, Freelancers, etc.
content.Infrastructure: The department has air conditioned lecture room and spacious designing classroom. This department is said to have one of the best manufacturing lab for students to have knowledge not only in design field but also have good knowledge of manufacturing of jewelry. The library here has the best and rare collection of books related to jewelry.

individual_reviews.course: Diploma In Food Technology - Batch of 2014
individual_reviews.title: My review of my college placements and faculty.

content.Placements: Placements are good. A large no of companies visit the college every year and hire a large no of candidates from all the fields of engineering and others as well. A training and placement department has been organized to look for the companies visiting the college every year for the recruitment of students and has been functioning properly since its inception.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college is very good and there is a large no of classrooms and labs. Classrooms are spacious and well ventilated, they are air-cooled as well. The college has all the facilities like library, canteen, and PCO. Overall the college infrastructure is good. Well-equipped labs are also there to help and nurture the skills of the students.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground
Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground

reviews.review_heading: If you want to get into media line, get this course now.
reviews.review_text: There are playgrounds for cricket, basketball, and tennis. There are computer labs, studio room, radio station room, monthly newspapers, library, and classrooms that are fully air-conditioning. There are air-conditioners, leads, lights, invertors, projectors, green boards, elegant furniture, etc., separately in every class.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in Uttarakhand.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is excellent. Classrooms are air-conditioned. Labs are well-equipped. The library holds an exhaustive collection of books, magazine and other articles related not just to the fashion industry but many other aspects. There is also a hostel facility for both girls and boys.

reviews.review_heading: The college stands above its expectations.
reviews.review_text: The college has a huge sports ground, a library, well-maintained computer lab, and auditorium. Each classroom is equipped with green boards and projectors. All the technical equipment like cameras and machines, etc., are provided here. The campus is Wi-Fi enabled. Discourses are organised regularly. They also organise trips to different parts of India.

reviews.review_heading: This is the best college for making a perfect career and to get success in life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is amazing. It has well-structured and air-conditioning classrooms. Our college also provides Wi-Fi facility to all students. There is a computer lab where students who do not have a laptop can work. There are two huge playgrounds along with proper cricket ground, net volleyball court, and badminton court. There are indoor games like table tennis, chess, ludo, etc. There is a library with an amazing collection of books. It has a proper medical facility too.

reviews.review_heading: Gyanarthi Media College in Uttarakhand For B.Com Fashion Course Information.
reviews.review_text: This college infrastructure quality are very good provide and sue high quality of product. In this college hostel facility are available but it takes extra charges on the feels. This college are many facilities provide such as Classroom, Bathroom, one Badroom in 2 student, Fast Wi-Fi connection, Library, Labs, gym etc. Facilities are available.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the facilities and sports and good in placement.
reviews.review_text: The facilities are well-equipped; all the infrastructure is available for our course, including Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, canteen, and medical facilities. One of the best things is our sports court for basketball; I just love it. The quality of food is average, but education and sports are well-maintained.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Economics - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: This is an excellent college in all aspects.

review_content.Placements: Students get placed in local branches of HDFC Bank, SBI sriram, etc. The top role offered is sales manager.
review_content.Infrastructure: Our college is Wi-Fi enabled on the entire campus. The laboratories are well-maintained, and the classrooms are big. In the classroom, around 100 students can sit together. The library is very good, if students need new books to read and study, then they will get them from the library. The sitting arrangement is very big in the library. Everything is well maintained.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2019
reviews_list.review_title: I am completely dissatisfied with the college building, facilities and lack of smart technology.

review_content.Placements: There are no placements at all here. But at the time of taking admission, our college promises or gives false and not legitimate testimony to provide placements. We can't rely on college to get selected in a better company even though you secure above-average marks.
review_content.Infrastructure: I was studying a bachelor of commerce, and hence we did not have to go to the library regularly. Our college premises and rooms are not well furnished. I suggest you not to take admission based on the type of infrastructure provided here. The canteen building is really pathetic, and it can be collapsed every now and then. There are a few other facilities which are very crucial to implement as soon as possible.

review_summary.college_name: Guru Nanak Dev University College, Pathankot Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Computer Applications (BCA) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am not satisfied by the infrastructure but the teachers are quite helpful in studies.

content.Placements: No salary packages or placements were offered in this college. Not even a single company came for recruitment. You have to find the placements by yourself from other colleges or have to search them online. If you are searching for a college for placement then this college should not be your choice at all.
content.Infrastructure: No Wi-Fi facilities are available in this college and there is lack of drinking water. Restrooms are quite dirty and messy. Grounds and parks are fine. There is a canteen inside the campus but it had been closed for a long time and did not offer the food of much quality.

individual_reviews.course: Discontinued (Jun-2023) -Diploma in Computer Applications (DCA) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: The college is good enough for study but no placement and hostel facility available.

content.Placements: No placements are done in our college as no company visits our college. We have to go on our own for jobs. The students who wants placement can visit main campus at Amritsar. The students are placed in good companies after doing this course and are doing good.
content.Infrastructure: There are no hostel facilities available as students studying here are local only mostly. They can do up and downs. The students from other city or state can take PG outside. The labs and classrooms are good maintained but are not much large. Students are using them efficiently .

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Economics - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: This is an excellent college in all aspects.

content.Placements: Students get placed in local branches of HDFC Bank, SBI sriram, etc. The top role offered is sales manager.
content.Infrastructure: Our college is Wi-Fi enabled on the entire campus. The laboratories are well-maintained, and the classrooms are big. In the classroom, around 100 students can sit together. The library is very good, if students need new books to read and study, then they will get them from the library. The sitting arrangement is very big in the library. Everything is well maintained.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2019
individual_reviews.title: I am completely dissatisfied with the college building, facilities and lack of smart technology.

content.Placements: There are no placements at all here. But at the time of taking admission, our college promises or gives false and not legitimate testimony to provide placements. We can't rely on college to get selected in a better company even though you secure above-average marks.
content.Infrastructure: I was studying a bachelor of commerce, and hence we did not have to go to the library regularly. Our college premises and rooms are not well furnished. I suggest you not to take admission based on the type of infrastructure provided here. The canteen building is really pathetic, and it can be collapsed every now and then. There are a few other facilities which are very crucial to implement as soon as possible.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Arts (B.A.) - Batch of 2023
individual_reviews.title: GNDU Pathankot is the best college.

content.Placements: There are 105 students placed in my course including me. The lowest package offered is 5K per month and the highest package is 15K per month. The top recruiting companies for my course are Bajaj Financers c/o Asian Paints Limited and c/o Ambuja Cement, among many others. 45% of students got internships from my course in Bajaj Financers c/o and Asian Paints Limited c/o.
content.Infrastructure: Wi-Fi, labs, classrooms, library, and all facilities are available. Basketball, cricket, volleyball games are available in my college, and the food at the canteen is very good. Some medical facilities are available; if any major problem occurs, there are good hospitals nearby within 1 to 4 kilometers.
